E come tale, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso sobrio, ispirazione e un'esperienza di vita. Insieme, facciamo in modo che accada. Questa è la tua possibilità di essere un membro della nostra cultura di modellazione: Questo è quello che ti trasferisci con noiStiamo cercando un supporto energetico per il nostro moderno ristorante personale, Capricorn, che è stato recentemente costruito poco meno di un anno fa. Sei il cuore delle nostre operazioni dietro le quinte, assicurando non solo la pulizia impeccabile, ma anche sostenere attivamente il nostro team di cucina con preparazioni culinarie. I vostri compiti: cucina Supporto: Si assiste attivamente con il lavoro di preparazione (mise-en-place), come il taglio professionale di verdure e altri compiti preparatori. Ordine e pulizia: Garantisci una pulizia impeccabile e l'organizzazione nella nostra cucina moderna così come nell'ufficio posteriore del ristorante Capricorn. Attenzione: Siete responsabili per la pulizia, la cura e lo stoccaggio preciso di porcellana, vetreria, posate e utensili da cucina (pot e pentole). Coordinamento e Organizzazione: Si lavora a stretto contatto con i team di cucina e servizio per garantire operazioni fluide — anche durante ore di punta occupato. Questa è l'esperienza professionale: Porti una solida esperienza nel settore della gastronomia, idealmente da un ambiente hotel a 4 o 5 stelle. Interesse a Culinary Arti: Vi piace la gestione di ingredienti freschi e sono felici di sostenere il team con la preparazione di cibo. Competenze linguistiche: Si comunica con fiducia in tedesco, inglese o italiano. Personalità: Sei caratterizzato da flessibilità e la capacità di lavorare bene in un team. Apprezzi un ambiente dinamico e goditi il lavoro in un team motivato. BenefitsAt Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale, e numerosi vantaggi.
descriptions.en: Linen Employee (part-time 50%) (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 50%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-10. ## This is what you move with us At the Grand Hotel Kronenhof, we value the highest quality – and this extends to our linen. Since our textiles are cleaned at the professional laundry facility of our partner hotel, the Kulm, we are looking for an organized individual to ensure a smooth workflow and on-site quality assurance in Pontresina.What you achieve with us:Logistics Management: You coordinate the daily flow of linen (soiled/clean) between the Kronenhof and the Kulm laundry. Quality Control: You inspect incoming laundry for cleanliness and completeness, ensuring our high standards are consistently met. Inventory Management: You organize the storage of floor linen, uniforms, and guest laundry, ensuring all departments are supplied on time. Communication: You serve as the direct point of contact for the laundry team at the Kulm Hotel and handle operational details with confidence. Minor Repairs: When necessary, you take care of simple sewing tasks or repairs to uniforms and textiles. ## This is you Organizational Talent: You maintain an overview even with large volumes of laundry and work in a structured and efficient manner. Quality Consciousness: You have an eye for textiles and immediately recognize when something does not meet our 5-star requirements. Reliability: Punctuality and the physical stamina required for handling laundry trolleys are a matter of course for you. Team Player: You communicate in a friendly and clear manner – both internally with Housekeeping and externally with colleagues at the Kulm. Language Skills: Good knowledge of English and either German or Italian is essential for coordination and documentation. ## Benefits At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. Apply now ## Food and Beverage Assistant (m/w/d) Kulm Hotel 100% People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: This is what you move with usIn this versatile key position, you are the “Enabler” of our entire F&B division. You bridge the gap between administrative precision, cutting-edge hospitality technology, and front-of-house operations. You ensure that technical processes run flawlessly in the background while proactively supporting the F&B management in their daily business.Your Mission - Where Culinary Delight meets Logistics:Reservation Management: You are the primary point of contact for reservations (on-site, phone, email) via our software for all hotel outlets.Menu Design & Coordination: In close collaboration with the kitchen, marketing, and restaurant management, you coordinate and update our menus via “Ai-web-to-print.”Daily Operations: During the season, you create daily half-board menus, staff menus, and buffet labeling using “Ai-web-to-print” and “Viewneo.”Guest Experiences: You process individual guest requests for aperitifs or birthdays, ensuring that "extra touch" that defines our service.Amenity Management: Coordinate guest amenities with the Front Office and Room Service, including payment processing via “Saferpay” and “Opera.”Front-Line Support: When needed, you actively support our team directly in service, staying close to our guests.Quality Ambassador: You ensure compliance with the highest standards (LQA and Forbes Travel Guide) and professionally handle guest feedback and complaints.Administrative Excellence: Preparation of corporate invoices and general correspondence (office share approx. 80–90%). This is youFoundation: Completed hotel or commercial apprenticeship, as well as professional experience in a similar role, ideally within the luxury hospitality industry.Linguistic Excellence: Business fluent in German and English (written and spoken). Italian is a significant asset.IT Proficiency: Confident handling of MS Office and hotel systems (e.g., Opera Cloud).Personality: You are an organizational talent with absolute reliability and discretion. You remain calm and solution-oriented, even under high pressure.Host Mindset: You communicate at the highest service level, possess a poised appearance, and apply a “hands-on” mentality when it counts.Why the Kulm Group? We offer you a workplace where tradition meets innovation. You will have the freedom to actively shape processes and benefit from the attractive perks of one of Switzerland's most renowned hotel groups.Ready to shape the F&B world of tomorrow? We look forward to receiving your application! BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. ## Chef de Partie - Gardemanger (m/w/d) Kulm Hotel 100% People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: This is what you move with usAt the Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, we don’t just cook, we shape the future of Luxury Mountain Travel. As a Chef de Partie Gardemanger, you are a cornerstone of our kitchen brigade. You bring "Smart Luxury" to the plate, ensuring every dish is as inspiring as the alpine peaks surrounding us. descriptions.fr: Linge de maison (à temps partiel 50%) (m/w/d) — Grand Hôtel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 50%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10 mois contrat. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-10. - Oui. C'est ce que vous déménagez avec nous Au Grand Hôtel Kronenhof, nous apprécions la plus haute qualité – et cela s'étend à notre linge. Puisque nos textiles sont nettoyés à la laverie professionnelle de notre hôtel partenaire, le Kulm, nous sommes à la recherche d'un individu organisé pour assurer un flux de travail fluide et l'assurance de la qualité sur place à Pontresina. Ce que vous accomplissez avec nous: Logistique Gestion : Vous coordonnez le flux quotidien de linge (huileux/propre) entre le Kronenhof et la buanderie Kulm. Contrôle de la qualité : Vous inspectez la lessive entrante pour en vérifier la propreté et l'exhaustivité, en veillant à ce que nos normes élevées soient constamment respectées. Gestion des stocks : Vous organisez le rangement du linge de sol, des uniformes et de la lessive invités, en veillant à ce que tous les départements soient fournis à temps. Communication: Vous servez de point de contact direct pour l'équipe de blanchisserie de l'hôtel Kulm et traitez les détails opérationnels avec confiance. Réparations mineures : Si nécessaire, vous vous occupez de tâches de couture simples ou de réparations aux uniformes et aux textiles. - Oui. C'est vous Talent organisationnel: Vous maintenez un aperçu même avec de grands volumes de linge et de travail d'une manière structurée et efficace. Qualité Conscience : Vous avez un œil pour les textiles et reconnaissez immédiatement quand quelque chose ne répond pas à nos exigences 5 étoiles. Fiabilité : La ponctualité et l'endurance physique nécessaires à la manipulation des chariots à linge sont bien sûr une question pour vous. Joueur de l'équipe : Vous communiquez de manière amicale et claire – à la fois en interne avec le personnel de ménage et en externe avec des collègues du Kulm. Compétences linguistiques : Une bonne connaissance de l'anglais et de l'allemand ou de l'italien est essentielle pour la coordination et la documentation. ## Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des possibilités de développement attrayantes, des logements confortables, des repas abordables dans le restaurant du personnel, et de nombreux avantages. descriptions.it: Maître de Rang (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadina, Grigioni). Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2025-12-01. # Questo è ciò che ti muovi con noi Gestisci con fiducia la tua sezione, garantendo un servizio senza interruzioni con un sorriso e un'attenzione ai dettagli. Coordinate il vostro team, delegate i compiti e garantite un'esecuzione impeccabile. Sei un vero ospite a cuore, consigliando i nostri ospiti internazionali sul menu e abbinamenti di vino. Si occupa di compiti amministrativi come la pianificazione a turni e la gestione degli ordini con efficienza e struttura. Introduci idee fresche e crei esperienze ospiti innovative che lasciano un'impressione duratura. Condividi la tua esperienza con il tuo team, promuovendo continuamente formazione e sviluppo. # Questa è una formazione completa in una cena raffinata e l'esperienza in ospitalità di lusso o gastronomia di fascia alta. Esperienza di leadership e la capacità di motivare e ispirare il vostro team all'eccellenza. Competenze di comunicazione e entusiasmo per lavorare con una clientela internazionale. Forte capacità organizzative, un elevato senso di qualità, e una spinta a fissare nuovi standard. Flessibilità, resilienza e passione per il servizio eccezionale. La fluidità in tedesco e inglese è essenziale; le lingue aggiuntive sono un plus. Impostare nuovi standard nella cena fine e diventare parte del nostro team. Attendiamo con ansia la vostra applicazione! ## Benefits At Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale, e numerosi vantaggi. ## Cook - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% persone a 1800m sul livello del mare stanno modellando il Luxury Mountain Travel. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti smart Luxury per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. Come membro del gruppo Luxury Kulm fai parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente ispiratore, unico e distintivo. E come tale, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso sobrio, ispirazione e un'esperienza di vita. Insieme, facciamo in modo che accada. Questa è la tua possibilità di essere un membro della nostra cultura di modellazione: La vostra tappa MissionYour – il nostro cuore dietro le quinte: Nel nostro hotel, it's non solo i nostri ospiti che prendono il palco centrale – i nostri dipendenti meritano anche momenti culinari che ispirano. Come Cook nel nostro recentemente stabilito Staff Restaurant, siete entrambi ospiti e esperti culinari. Con una cucina fresca e creativa e un orecchio aperto per i desideri del nostro team, aiuta a garantire che i nostri colleghi si sentano veramente a casa. descriptions.fr: Maître de Rang (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadine, Grisons). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Saisonnier. Stellenantritt: 2025-12-01. ## C'est ce que vous déménagez avec nous Vous gérez votre section en toute confiance, assurant un service fluide avec le sourire et le souci du détail. Vous coordonnez votre équipe, déléguez des tâches et garantissez une exécution sans faille. Vous êtes un véritable hôte dans l'âme, conseillant nos clients internationaux sur les accords menus et vins. Vous assumez des tâches administratives telles que la planification des équipes et la gestion des commandes avec efficacité et structure. Vous introduisez de nouvelles idées et créez des expériences clients innovantes qui laissent une impression durable. Vous partagez votre expertise avec votre équipe, en favorisant continuellement la formation et le développement. ## This is you Une formation complète en gastronomie et une expérience dans l'hôtellerie de luxe ou la gastronomie haut de gamme. Expérience en leadership et capacité à motiver et à inspirer votre équipe vers l’excellence. Compétences de communication exceptionnelles et enthousiasme pour travailler avec une clientèle internationale. Solides compétences organisationnelles, sens élevé de la qualité et volonté d'établir de nouvelles normes. Flexibilité, résilience et passion pour fournir un service exceptionnel. La maîtrise de l'allemand et de l'anglais est essentielle ; des langues supplémentaires sont un plus. Établissez de nouvelles normes en matière de gastronomie et faites partie de notre équipe. Nous attendons votre candidature avec impatience ! ## Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos collaborateurs sont au cœur de notre réussite. Nous proposons des opportunités de développement attrayantes, un hébergement confortable, des repas abordables au restaurant du personnel et de nombreux avantages. Postulez maintenant ## Cuisinier - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Les gens à 1800 m d'altitude façonnent le voyage de luxe en montagne. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale propose à nos clients un Luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inimitable. En tant que membre du groupe Luxury Kulm, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Et en tant que tel, nous embrassons notre culture : un luxe discret, de l’inspiration et une expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous y parvenons. C'est votre chance de faire partie de notre culture de création : Votre missionVotre scène – notre cœur dans les coulisses : Dans notre hôtel, ce ne sont pas seulement nos clients qui occupent le devant de la scène – nos collaborateurs méritent également des moments culinaires inspirants. En tant que cuisinier dans notre nouveau restaurant du personnel, vous êtes à la fois hôte et expert culinaire. Avec une cuisine fraîche et créative et une oreille attentive aux souhaits de notre équipe, vous contribuez à ce que nos collègues se sentent vraiment chez eux. Vos responsabilités Élaborer des menus variés et équilibrés pour notre équipe – avec le souci du détail et la passion de la qualité Être un hôte au restaurant du personnel : accueillir, impliquer et créer une ambiance positive Planification des menus et mise en place de semaines thématiques culinaires – vos idées sont les bienvenues Combinaison du service buffet et du live cooking Assurer le bon fonctionnement de votre rayon – de la mise en place à la fermeture impeccable de la cuisine Respect des règles d'hygiène selon HACCP – la propreté est une seconde nature pour vous Collaboration étroite avec l'équipe de cuisine, les achats et les RH – pour assurer un grande expérience pour notre équipe C'est vous Une formation terminée en tant que chef certifié ou qualification équivalente Une expérience en cuisine chaude et froide, idéalement dans la restauration collective ou dans l'hôtellerie Une passion pour le travail avec les gens - vous aimez être hôte, même pour vos collègues Fortes capacités d'organisation, de résilience et un style de travail structuré Créativité dans la planification des menus - saisonniers, équilibrés et pleins de saveurs Bonnes compétences en allemand et en anglais, l'italien est un plus Si vous souhaitez combiner votre amour pour les arts culinaires avec une véritable mentalité d'hôte - et contribuer à l'un des plus beaux hôtels en Suisse – nous attendons avec impatience de recevoir votre candidature. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti smart Luxury per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. Come membro del gruppo Luxury Kulm fai parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente ispiratore, unico e distintivo. E come tale, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso sobrio, ispirazione e un'esperienza di vita. Insieme, facciamo in modo che accada. Questa è la tua possibilità di essere un membro della nostra cultura di modellazione: Questo è quello che ti trasferisci con noiStiamo cercando un supporto energetico per il nostro moderno ristorante personale, Capricorn, che è stato recentemente costruito poco meno di un anno fa. Sei il cuore delle nostre operazioni dietro le quinte, assicurando non solo la pulizia impeccabile, ma anche sostenere attivamente il nostro team di cucina con preparazioni culinarie. I vostri compiti: cucina Supporto: Si assiste attivamente con il lavoro di preparazione (mise-en-place), come il taglio professionale di verdure e altri compiti preparatori. Ordine e pulizia: Garantisci una pulizia impeccabile e l'organizzazione nella nostra cucina moderna così come nell'ufficio posteriore del ristorante Capricorn. Attenzione: Siete responsabili per la pulizia, la cura e lo stoccaggio preciso di porcellana, vetreria, posate e utensili da cucina (pot e pentole). Coordinamento e Organizzazione: Si lavora a stretto contatto con i team di cucina e servizio per garantire operazioni fluide — anche durante ore di punta occupato. Questa è l'esperienza professionale: Porti una solida esperienza nel settore della gastronomia, idealmente da un ambiente hotel a 4 o 5 stelle. Interesse a Culinary Arti: Vi piace la gestione di ingredienti freschi e sono felici di sostenere il team con la preparazione di cibo. Competenze linguistiche: Si comunica con fiducia in tedesco, inglese o italiano. Personalità: Sei caratterizzato da flessibilità e la capacità di lavorare bene in un team. Apprezzi un ambiente dinamico e goditi il lavoro in un team motivato. BenefitsAt Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Diventa la forza trainante dietro le nostre esperienze culinarie e garantire operazioni impeccabile nel back-of-house. Inventory & Cost Control: tenere traccia di stock, prodotti chimici e materiali di consumo; garantire processi efficienti senza tempi di fermo. Pratico mindset & panoramica: si prendono decisioni intelligenti, rimanere calmi nei tempi di punta, e prendere la proprietà. Leadership & capacità di comunicazione. mentalità a mano: proattiva, orientata alla soluzione, e un modello di ruolo per la pulizia, l'ordine e l'efficienza. Conoscenza solida dell'igiene e della tecnologia: competenza HACCP, familiarità con la tecnologia di pulizia, e fiducia con gli strumenti di pianificazione / ufficio. Flessibilità: disponibilità a turni di lavoro, fine settimana e eventi di supporto – si gode il polso di una vivace proprietà di lusso. Lingue: portoghese o italiano e inglese. Careful Handling: You will be responsible for the precise handling, cleaning, and storage of porcelain, silverware, glassware, and blackware. Coordination and Organization: Ensure smooth operations through efficient organization and coordination of daily tasks. Start: immediate ## This is you Hospitality Experience: You bring solid experience from the hospitality industry, ideally in a high-demand environment. Language Skills: German or English or Italian Flexibility and Team Spirit: Your ability to adapt to changing requirements and work effectively within a dynamic team is a key strength. Start: per immediate wanted, until ca. 06.04. ## Benefits At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. Apply now ## Office Employee/Steward - Staff Restaurant "Capricorn" (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: This is what you move with usWe are looking for energetic support for our modern staff restaurant, Capricorn, which was newly built just under a year ago. You are the heart of our behind-the-scenes operations, ensuring not only impeccable cleanliness but also actively supporting our kitchen team with culinary preparations.Your Tasks:Kitchen Support: You actively assist with preparation work (mise-en-place), such as the professional cutting of vegetables and other preparatory tasks.Order and Cleanliness: You ensure flawless cleanliness and organization in our modern kitchen as well as in the back office of the Capricorn restaurant.Careful Handling: You are responsible for the precise cleaning, care, and storage of china, glassware, cutlery, and kitchenware (pots and pans).Coordination and Organization: You work closely with the kitchen and service teams to ensure smooth operations—even during busy peak hours. This is youProfessional Experience: You bring solid experience from the gastronomy sector, ideally from a 4- or 5-star hotel environment.Interest in Culinary Arts: You enjoy handling fresh ingredients and are happy to support the team with food preparation.Language Skills: You communicate confidently in German, English, or Italian.Personality: You are characterized by flexibility and the ability to work well in a team. You appreciate a dynamic environment and enjoy working within a motivated team. BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. ## Supervisor Stewarding (m/w/d) Kulm Hotel 100% People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: This is what you move with usDo you thrive on crystal-clear processes, impeccable hygiene, and teamwork at a 5-star superior level? Become the driving force behind our culinary experiences and ensure flawless operations in the back-of-house. Your Responsibilities: Shift & Duty Planning across multiple outlets (Grand Restaurant, Amaru, Pizzeria, Room Service, Banquets, external events) – you orchestrate seamless operations from mise-en-place to breakdown. Leadership & Coaching of the Stewarding Team: daily briefings, clear standards, motivating presence – and when the pressure is on, you lead by working hands-on. Hygiene & Quality Assurance at the highest level (HACCP-compliant): inspections, documentation, and training to guarantee spotless standards. Dishwashing & Equipment Management: efficient use of modern facilities, care and maintenance, acting as a key link between kitchen, service, and events. Inventory & Cost Control: keeping track of stock, chemicals, and consumables; ensuring efficient processes without downtime. Event Excellence: logistics for large-scale functions, setting up return stations, and managing swift turnarounds. This is youExperience in luxury hospitality/catering within Stewarding or Back-of-House – ideally in a supervisory or assistant managerial role. Practical mindset & overview: you make smart decisions, remain calm in peak times, and take ownership. Leadership & communication skills. Hands-on mentality: proactive, solution-oriented, and a role model for cleanliness, order, and efficiency. Solid knowledge of hygiene & technology: HACCP expertise, familiarity with cleaning technology, and confidence with planning/office tools. Flexibility: willingness to work shifts, weekends, and support events – you enjoy the pulse of a lively luxury property. Languages: Portuguese or Italian as well as English. BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. ## Food and Beverage Assistant (m/w/d) Kulm Hotel 100% People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: This is what you move with usIn this versatile key position, you are the “Enabler” of our entire F&B division. You bridge the gap between administrative precision, cutting-edge hospitality technology, and front-of-house operations. You ensure that technical processes run flawlessly in the background while proactively supporting the F&B management in their daily business.Your Mission - Where Culinary Delight meets Logistics:Reservation Management: You are the primary point of contact for reservations (on-site, phone, email) via our software for all hotel outlets.Menu Design & Coordination: In close collaboration with the kitchen, marketing, and restaurant management, you coordinate and update our menus via “Ai-web-to-print.”Daily Operations: During the season, you create daily half-board menus, staff menus, and buffet labeling using “Ai-web-to-print” and “Viewneo.”Guest Experiences: You process individual guest requests for aperitifs or birthdays, ensuring that "extra touch" that defines our service.Amenity Management: Coordinate guest amenities with the Front Office and Room Service, including payment processing via “Saferpay” and “Opera.”Front-Line Support: When needed, you actively support our team directly in service, staying close to our guests.Quality Ambassador: You ensure compliance with the highest standards (LQA and Forbes Travel Guide) and professionally handle guest feedback and complaints.Administrative Excellence: Preparation of corporate invoices and general correspondence (office share approx. 80–90%). This is youFoundation: Completed hotel or commercial apprenticeship, as well as professional experience in a similar role, ideally within the luxury hospitality industry.Linguistic Excellence: Business fluent in German and English (written and spoken). Italian is a significant asset.IT Proficiency: Confident handling of MS Office and hotel systems (e.g., Opera Cloud).Personality: You are an organizational talent with absolute reliability and discretion. You remain calm and solution-oriented, even under high pressure.Host Mindset: You communicate at the highest service level, possess a poised appearance, and apply a “hands-on” mentality when it counts.Why the Kulm Group? We offer you a workplace where tradition meets innovation. You will have the freedom to actively shape processes and benefit from the attractive perks of one of Switzerland's most renowned hotel groups.Ready to shape the F&B world of tomorrow? We look forward to receiving your application! BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.
descriptions.de: Büroangestellte - Steward (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Saisonal. Stellenantritt: 2026-02-10. oder Dies ist, was Sie mit uns Sauberkeit und Organisation bewegen: Sie sorgen für eine einwandfreie Sauberkeit und Ordnung in unserer High-End-Küche und dem Büro des Restaurants. Pflegende Handhabung: Sie sind verantwortlich für die präzise Handhabung, Reinigung und Lagerung von Porzellan, Besteck, Glaswaren und Blackware. Koordination und Organisation: Gewährleistung reibungsloser Operationen durch effiziente Organisation und Koordination der täglichen Aufgaben. Start: sofort oder Dies ist Ihr Hospitality Experience: Sie bringen solide Erfahrungen aus der Gastfreundschaft, ideal in einer hochauflösenden Umgebung. Sprachkompetenzen: Deutsch oder Englisch oder Italienisch Flexibilität und Team Spirit: Ihre Fähigkeit, sich an wechselnde Anforderungen anzupassen und effektiv in einem dynamischen Team zu arbeiten, ist eine zentrale Stärke. Beginn: pro sofort gewollt, bis ca. 06.04. Vorteile Bei der Kulm Group sind unsere Mitarbeiter das Herz unseres Erfolgs. Wir bieten attraktive Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten, komfortable Unterkünfte, erschwingliche Mahlzeiten im Personalrestaurant und zahlreiche Getränke. Bewerben Sie sich jetzt - Steward (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100 % Menschen auf 1800m über dem Meeresspiegel prägen den Luxury Mountain Travel. Unsere dynamische und internationale Gemeinschaft bietet unseren Gästen smart Luxury für ein unnachahmliches Urlaubserlebnis. Als Mitglied der Luxury Kulm Group sind Sie Teil des Schlüssels für unseren Erfolg. Gemeinsam machen wir jeden Aufenthalt zutiefst inspirierend, einzigartig und unverwechselbar. Und als solche nehmen wir unsere Kultur an: unterschätzter Luxus, Inspiration und ein Lebenserlebnis. Gemeinsam schaffen wir es. Dies ist Ihre Chance, Mitglied unserer formgebenden Kultur zu sein: Dies ist, was Sie mit uns bewegen Wir suchen energische Unterstützung für unser modernes Personal Restaurant, Steinbock, das vor knapp einem Jahr neu gebaut wurde. Sie sind das Herz unserer Hinter-The-Szenen-Operationen, die nicht nur tadellose Sauberkeit, sondern auch aktiv unser Küchenteam mit kulinarischen Vorbereitungen unterstützen. Ihre Aufgaben:Kitchen Unterstützung: Sie unterstützen aktiv bei der Vorbereitungsarbeit (Miss-en-Ort), wie dem professionellen Schneiden von Gemüse und anderen Vorbereitungsaufgaben. Stellenantritt: 2026-02-10. ## This is what you move with us We are looking for energetic support for our modern staff restaurant, Capricorn, which was newly built just under a year ago. You are the heart of our behind-the-scenes operations, ensuring not only impeccable cleanliness but also actively supporting our kitchen team with culinary preparations.Your Tasks:Kitchen Support: You actively assist with preparation work (mise-en-place), such as the professional cutting of vegetables and other preparatory tasks. Order and Cleanliness: You ensure flawless cleanliness and organization in our modern kitchen as well as in the back office of the Capricorn restaurant. Careful Handling: You are responsible for the precise cleaning, care, and storage of china, glassware, cutlery, and kitchenware (pots and pans). Coordination and Organization: You work closely with the kitchen and service teams to ensure smooth operations—even during busy peak hours. ## This is you Professional Experience: You bring solid experience from the gastronomy sector, ideally from a 4- or 5-star hotel environment. Interest in Culinary Arts: You enjoy handling fresh ingredients and are happy to support the team with food preparation. Language Skills: You communicate confidently in German, English, or Italian. Personality: You are characterized by flexibility and the ability to work well in a team. You appreciate a dynamic environment and enjoy working within a motivated team. ## Benefits At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. Apply now ## Supervisor Stewarding (m/w/d) Kulm Hotel 100% People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: This is what you move with usDo you thrive on crystal-clear processes, impeccable hygiene, and teamwork at a 5-star superior level? Become the driving force behind our culinary experiences and ensure flawless operations in the back-of-house. Your Responsibilities: Shift & Duty Planning across multiple outlets (Grand Restaurant, Amaru, Pizzeria, Room Service, Banquets, external events) – you orchestrate seamless operations from mise-en-place to breakdown. Leadership & Coaching of the Stewarding Team: daily briefings, clear standards, motivating presence – and when the pressure is on, you lead by working hands-on. Hygiene & Quality Assurance at the highest level (HACCP-compliant): inspections, documentation, and training to guarantee spotless standards. Dishwashing & Equipment Management: efficient use of modern facilities, care and maintenance, acting as a key link between kitchen, service, and events. Inventory & Cost Control: keeping track of stock, chemicals, and consumables; ensuring efficient processes without downtime. Event Excellence: logistics for large-scale functions, setting up return stations, and managing swift turnarounds. This is youExperience in luxury hospitality/catering within Stewarding or Back-of-House – ideally in a supervisory or assistant managerial role. Practical mindset & overview: you make smart decisions, remain calm in peak times, and take ownership. Leadership & communication skills. Hands-on mentality: proactive, solution-oriented, and a role model for cleanliness, order, and efficiency. Solid knowledge of hygiene & technology: HACCP expertise, familiarity with cleaning technology, and confidence with planning/office tools. Flexibility: willingness to work shifts, weekends, and support events – you enjoy the pulse of a lively luxury property. Languages: Portuguese or Italian as well as English. BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. ## Office Employee - Steward (start immediately) (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: This is what you move with usCleanliness and Organization: You will ensure impeccable cleanliness and order in our high-end kitchen and the restaurant's back office.Careful Handling: You will be responsible for the precise handling, cleaning, and storage of porcelain, silverware, glassware, and blackware.Coordination and Organization: Ensure smooth operations through efficient organization and coordination of daily tasks.Start: immediate This is youHospitality Experience: You bring solid experience from the hospitality industry, ideally in a high-demand environment.Language Skills: German or English or ItalianFlexibility and Team Spirit: Your ability to adapt to changing requirements and work effectively within a dynamic team is a key strength.Start: per immediate wanted, until ca. 06.04. BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. ## Food and Beverage Assistant (m/w/d) Kulm Hotel 100% People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: This is what you move with usIn this versatile key position, you are the “Enabler” of our entire F&B division. You bridge the gap between administrative precision, cutting-edge hospitality technology, and front-of-house operations. You ensure that technical processes run flawlessly in the background while proactively supporting the F&B management in their daily business.Your Mission - Where Culinary Delight meets Logistics:Reservation Management: You are the primary point of contact for reservations (on-site, phone, email) via our software for all hotel outlets.Menu Design & Coordination: In close collaboration with the kitchen, marketing, and restaurant management, you coordinate and update our menus via “Ai-web-to-print.”Daily Operations: During the season, you create daily half-board menus, staff menus, and buffet labeling using “Ai-web-to-print” and “Viewneo.”Guest Experiences: You process individual guest requests for aperitifs or birthdays, ensuring that "extra touch" that defines our service.Amenity Management: Coordinate guest amenities with the Front Office and Room Service, including payment processing via “Saferpay” and “Opera.”Front-Line Support: When needed, you actively support our team directly in service, staying close to our guests.Quality Ambassador: You ensure compliance with the highest standards (LQA and Forbes Travel Guide) and professionally handle guest feedback and complaints.Administrative Excellence: Preparation of corporate invoices and general correspondence (office share approx. 80–90%). Italian is a significant asset.IT Proficiency: Confident handling of MS Office and hotel systems (e.g., Opera Cloud).Personality: You are an organizational talent with absolute reliability and discretion. descriptions.de: Büroangestellter – Steward (sofort starten) (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100 %. Vertrag: Saisonstelle. Stellenantritt: 10.02.2026. ## Das bewegst du bei uns Wir suchen tatkräftige Verstärkung für unser modernes Mitarbeiterrestaurant Capricorn, das vor knapp einem Jahr neu erbaut wurde. Du bist das Herzstück unserer Back-of-House-Abteilung und sorgst nicht nur für makellose Sauberkeit, sondern unterstützt unsere Küche auch aktiv bei der kulinarischen Vorbereitung. Deine Aufgaben: Küchenunterstützung: Du hilfst aktiv bei der Vorbereitung (Mise-en-place), z. B. beim professionellen Schneiden von Gemüse und anderen vorbereitenden Tätigkeiten. Ordnung & Sauberkeit: Du gewährleistest einwandfreie Sauberkeit und Organisation in unserer modernen Küche sowie im Back-Office des Capricorn-Restaurants. Sorgfältiger Umgang: Du übernimmst die präzise Reinigung, Pflege und Lagerung von Geschirr, Besteck, Gläsern und Küchenutensilien (Töpfen und Pfannen). Koordination & Organisation: Du arbeitest eng mit Küche und Service zusammen, um einen reibungslosen Ablauf sicherzustellen – auch während hektischer Hochphasen. ## Das bist du Berufserfahrung: Du bringst fundierte Erfahrung aus der Gastronomie mit, idealerweise aus einem 4- oder 5-Sterne-Hotel. Interesse an Kulinarik: Du hast Freude am Umgang mit frischen Lebensmitteln und unterstützt das Team gerne bei der Speisenvorbereitung. Sprachkenntnisse: Du kommunizierst sicher auf Deutsch, Englisch oder Italienisch. Persönlichkeit: Du zeichnest dich durch Flexibilität und Teamfähigkeit aus. Du schätzt ein dynamisches Umfeld und arbeitest gerne in einem motivierten Team. ## Benefits Bei der Kulm Group sind unsere Mitarbeitenden das Herzstück unseres Erfolgs. Wir bieten attraktive Weiterentwicklungsmöglichkeiten, komfortable Unterkünfte, günstige Verpflegung im Mitarbeiterrestaurant und zahlreiche weitere Vergünstigungen. Jetzt bewerben ## Supervisor Stewarding (m/w/d) Kulm Hotel Menschen auf 1800 m ü. M. gestalten den Luxury Mountain Travel. Unsere dynamische, internationale Community bietet unseren Gästen smart Luxury für ein unnachahmliches Ferienerlebnis. Als Mitglied der Luxury Kulm Group bist du Teil des Schlüssels zu unserem Erfolg. Gemeinsam machen wir jeden Aufenthalt tiefgründig inspirierend, einzigartig und unverwechselbar. Dabei leben wir unsere Kultur: dezenter Luxus, Inspiration und ein Lebensgefühl. Gemeinsam machen wir’s möglich. Das ist deine Chance, Teil unserer prägenden Kultur zu sein: ## Das bewegst du bei uns Liebst du klare Prozesse, makellose Hygiene und Teamarbeit auf 5-Sterne-Superior-Niveau? Werde zum Treibstoff hinter unseren kulinarischen Erlebnissen und sorge für einwandfreie Abläufe im Back-of-House. Deine Verantwortung: Schicht- & Aufgabenplanung über mehrere Outlets (Grand Restaurant, Amaru, Pizzeria, Room Service, Bankette, externe Events) – Du orchestrierst reibungslose Abläufe von der Mise-en-place bis zum Abbau. Führung & Coaching des Stewarding-Teams: tägliche Briefings, klare Standards, motivierende Präsenz – und wenn’s drauf ankommt, gehst du voran. Hygiene- & Qualitätssicherung auf höchstem Niveau (HACCP-konform): Kontrollen, Dokumentationen und Schulungen, um makellose Standards zu garantieren. Geschirr- & Equipmentmanagement: effizienter Einsatz moderner Anlagen, Pflege und Wartung, Schlüsselfunktion zwischen Küche, Service und Events. Inventar- & Kostenkontrolle: Überblick über Bestände, Chemikalien und Verbrauchsmaterial; effiziente Prozesse ohne Ausfallzeiten. Event-Exzellenz: Logistik für Großveranstaltungen, Aufbau von Rückgabestationen und schnelle Umbauphasen. ## Das bist du Erfahrung im Luxus-Hospitality/Catering im Stewarding oder Back-of-House – idealerweise in einer supervisory- oder assistent-manager-Rolle. Praxisorientierter Blick & Überblick: Du triffst kluge Entscheidungen, bleibst in Spitzenzeiten ruhig und übernimmst Verantwortung. Führungs- & Kommunikationsstärke. Hands-on-Mentalität: proaktiv, lösungsorientiert und Vorbild in Sauberkeit, Ordnung und Effizienz. Solides Hygiene- & Technik-Know-how: HACCP-Expertise, Kenntnisse über Reinigungstechnik und sicherer Umgang mit Planungs-/Office-Tools. Flexibilität: Bereitschaft zu Schicht-, Wochenend- und Eventeinsätzen – du liebst den Puls einer lebendigen Luxus-Destination. Sprachen: Portugiesisch oder Italienisch sowie Englisch. ## Benefits Bei der Kulm Group sind unsere Mitarbeitenden das Herzstück unseres Erfolgs. Wir bieten attraktive Weiterentwicklungsmöglichkeiten, komfortable Unterkünfte, günstige Verpflegung im Mitarbeiterrestaurant und zahlreiche weitere Vergünstigungen. ## Büroangestellter – Steward (sofort starten) (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof Menschen auf 1800 m ü. descriptions.fr: Employé de bureau – Steward (début immédiat) (h/f/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadine, Grisons). Taux d’occupation: 100 %. Contrat: poste saisonnier. Prise de poste: 10.02.2026. ## Ce que vous ferez chez nous Nous recherchons un soutien énergique pour notre restaurant du personnel moderne, le Capricorn, construit il y a tout juste un an. Vous êtes le cœur de nos opérations en coulisses, garantissant non seulement une propreté irréprochable, mais soutenant aussi activement notre brigade de cuisine dans les préparations culinaires. Vos tâches: Soutien cuisine: vous participez activement aux travaux de préparation (mise-en-place), comme la découpe professionnelle des légumes et autres tâches préparatoires. Ordre & propreté: vous assurez une propreté et une organisation parfaites dans notre cuisine moderne ainsi que dans le back-office du restaurant Capricorn. Manipulation soignée: vous êtes responsable du nettoyage précis, de l’entretien et du rangement de la vaisselle, des couverts, verres et ustensiles de cuisine (casseroles et poêles). Coordination & organisation: vous collaborez étroitement avec les équipes cuisine et service pour garantir un déroulement fluide — même pendant les pointes de fréquentation. ## C’est vous Expérience professionnelle: vous possédez une solide expérience dans la restauration, idéalement dans un hôtel 4 ou 5 étoiles. Intérêt pour la cuisine: vous aimez manipuler des produits frais et soutenir volontiers l’équipe dans la préparation des mets. Compétences linguistiques: vous communiquez aisément en allemand, anglais ou italien. Personnalité: vous êtes flexible et aimez travailler en équipe. Vous appréciez un environnement dynamique et aimez évoluer dans une équipe motivée. ## Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos collaborateurs sont le cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des opportunités de développement attractives, des logements confortables, des repas à prix avantageux au restaurant du personnel et de nombreux autres avantages. Postulez dès maintenant ## Supervisor Stewarding (h/f/d) Kulm Hotel Des personnes à 1800 m d’altitude façonnent le Luxury Mountain Travel. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale offre à nos hôtes un smart luxury pour une expérience de vacances inimitable. En tant que membre du Luxury Kulm Group, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Ainsi, nous embrassons notre culture: luxe discret, inspiration et expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous faisons en sorte que cela arrive. C’est votre chance de faire partie de notre culture façonnante: ## Ce que vous ferez chez nous Vous êtes passionné par des processus clairs, une hygiène irréprochable et le travail d’équipe au niveau 5 étoiles supérieur? Devenez la force motrice de nos expériences culinaires et assurez des opérations parfaites en back-of-house. Vos responsabilités: Planification des shifts & tâches sur plusieurs points de vente (Grand Restaurant, Amaru, Pizzeria, Room Service, banquets, événements externes) – vous orchestrez des opérations fluides de la mise-en-place au breakdown. Leadership & coaching de l’équipe stewarding: briefings quotidiens, standards clairs, présence motivante – et quand la pression monte, vous montrez l’exemple en étant sur le terrain. Assurance hygiène & qualité au plus haut niveau (conforme HACCP): inspections, documentations et formations pour garantir des standards impeccables. Gestion du lavage & équipement: utilisation efficace des installations modernes, entretien, maîtrise du lien entre cuisine, service et événements. Contrôle des stocks & coûts: suivi des stocks, produits chimiques et consommables; processus efficaces sans temps d’arrêt. Excellence événementielle: logistique pour grandes fonctions, mise en place des stations de retour et gestion de rotations rapides. ## C’est vous Expérience dans l’hôtellerie de luxe / restauration en stewarding ou back-of-house – idéalement en rôle de supervision ou assistant manager. État d’esprit pratique & vue d’ensemble: vous prenez des décisions intelligentes, restez calme en période de pointe et assumez la responsabilité. Compétences en leadership & communication. Mentalité hands-on: proactif, orienté solutions et modèle de propreté, d’ordre et d’efficacité. Solides connaissances hygiène & technologie: expertise HACCP, familiarité avec la technologie de nettoyage et aisance avec les outils de planification/bureau. Flexibilité: volonté de travailler par shifts, week-ends et de soutenir les événements – vous aimez le rythme d’une propriété de luxe dynamique. Langues: portugais ou italien ainsi qu’anglais. ## Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos collaborateurs sont le cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des opportunités de développement attractives, des logements confortables, des repas à prix avantageux au restaurant du personnel et de nombreux autres avantages. ## Employé de bureau – Steward (début immédiat) (h/f/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof Des personnes à 1800 m d’altitude façonnent le Luxury Mountain Travel. descriptions.it: Guardia di vita (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadina, Grigioni). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / contratto di 10 mesi. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01. # Questo è ciò che ti muovi con noi Creare momenti di piscina perfetti: Garantisci operazioni fluide nella piscina e nella zona sauna mantenendo ogni dettaglio in vista. Un ospite a cuore: con un sorriso caldo, accogliete i nostri ospiti e badate a loro attentamente in tutta la zona spa e piscina. Igiene al massimo livello: Mantenete la pulizia e l'ordine in tutto il centro benessere e fate controlli di qualità giornalieri. Momenti di benessere: con le tue competenze aggiuntive in infusioni di sauna, palestra di acqua e lezioni di nuoto per i nostri ospiti più piccoli, contribuisci attivamente alla loro esperienza di relax e gioia in acqua. # Questo è il titolare del “Brevet Plus Pool” (SLRG) con solida conoscenza di pronto soccorso. Esperienza nelle operazioni in piscina e competenze nella conduzione di infusioni di sauna, palestra acqua e lezioni di nuoto per i bambini. Eccellente tedesco e inglese competenze; lingue aggiuntive sono un vantaggio. Una personalità attenta e calorosa con un forte senso di servizio e quella speciale cosa che delizia gli ospiti. ## Benefits At Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. • Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale, e numerosi vantaggi. Applicare ora ## Fiorista (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% persone a 1800m sul livello del mare stanno modellando il Luxury Mountain Travel. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti smart Luxury per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. Come membro del gruppo Luxury Kulm fai parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente ispiratore, unico e distintivo. E come tale, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso sobrio, ispirazione e un'esperienza di vita. Insieme, facciamo in modo che accada. Questa è la tua possibilità di essere un membro della nostra cultura di modellazione: Questo è ciò che si muove con noiRisponsabile per tutte le composizioni floreali nel nostro hotel, tra cui la creazione di pezzi centrali, mazzi di fiori, ecc. Decorare spazi pubblici non solo per uso quotidiano ma anche per occasioni speciali come feste, eventi di gala, funzioni private, ecc. Organizzazione e consulenza su paesaggi esterni Cura corretta di fiori e piante verdi Approvvigionamento di tutti i fiori, le piante e i materiali Sviluppo e implementazione del concetto, aderendo al bilancio specificato Questo è il tuo Hai completato con successo la formazione in fioristi e hanno diversi anni di esperienza (preferibilmente nel settore alberghiero) Con un tocco creativo, sai come deliziare i nostri ospiti con le tue decorazioni floreali e creare un'atmosfera impressionante e un'atmosfera unica dentro e fuori il nostro hotel di lusso Sei flessibile, apprezzi la buona comunicazione, e sono abituati a lavorare indipendentemente. Anche sotto pressione, si rimane composti e calmi, e si dispone di un demeanor naturale e amichevole verso gli ospiti e colleghi. Lingue: Inglese o Tedesco Vantaggi A Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. • Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale, e numerosi vantaggi. ## Fiorista (m/w/d) Kulm Hotel 100% Persone a 1800m sul livello del mare stanno plasmando il Luxury Mountain Travel. E come tale, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso sobrio, ispirazione e un'esperienza di vita. Insieme, facciamo in modo che accada. Questa è la tua possibilità di essere un membro della nostra cultura di modellazione: Questo è ciò che si muove con noiIl Kulm Hotel è di fama mondiale per le sue magnifiche sale e meticolosa attenzione ai dettagli. Come la mano destra al nostro fiorista capo, si giocherà un ruolo chiave nel trasformare il nostro hotel in un capolavoro fiorente. Sei più di un fiorista – sei un ambasciatore di estetica ed eleganza. La vostra missione: Creative Staging: Prenderai un ruolo di primo piano nell'intero design floreale—dall'allestimento di tavoli delicati a grandi mazzi imponenti per le nostre suite più esclusive. Eventi: Mostra le tue abilità nel design floreale su larga scala durante matrimoni glamour, serate di gala, e grandi progetti stagionali (come il nostro leggendario Natale e New Year's Eve decorazioni). Perfezione in dettaglio: Si garantisce un aspetto costantemente impeccabile di tutti gli arrangiamenti e piante verdi, sia all'interno che all'esterno. Assumere la responsabilità: Sostiene il capo reparto in modo operativo, coordina le consegne di fiori, e assicurarsi che i nostri standard di alta qualità sono sentiti in ogni singolo accordo. Data di inizio: 1 giugno, 2026 Questo e' il tuo libro. Hai una formazione professionale completa come fiorista e esperienza professionale iniziale nel settore. Passione creativa: Hai un occhio affilato per colori, forme e tendenze attuali. Il vostro obiettivo è quello di creare un'atmosfera "migliorante" per i nostri ospiti internazionali. Composure: Anche durante eventi importanti e periodi ad alto volume, si lavora con precisione ed efficienza, mantenendo sempre un occhio per i minimi dettagli. Personalità: Il tuo aspetto è lucido come il tuo lavoro floreale. Sei un comunicatore proattivo all'interno del team e un punto di contatto caldo per i nostri ospiti. Lingue: Siete in grado di comunicare efficacemente in tedesco o in inglese. Perché il gruppo Kulm? Vi offriamo un palcoscenico per la vostra creatività in una delle posizioni più esclusive del mondo. Diventa parte di un team che valorizza la vera artigianalità, incoraggia l'iniziativa e prospera in una cultura del rispetto reciproco e dello spirito di squadra. Sei pronto a far fiorire il Kulm? Non vediamo l'ora di ricevere la vostra applicazione! BenefitsAt Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. • Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale, e numerosi vantaggi. ## Spa Therapist (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% persone a 1800m sul livello del mare stanno modellando il Luxury Mountain Travel. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti smart Luxury per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. Come membro del gruppo Luxury Kulm fai parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente ispiratore, unico e distintivo. E come tale, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso sobrio, ispirazione e un'esperienza di vita. Insieme, facciamo in modo che accada. Questa è la tua possibilità di essere un membro della nostra cultura di modellazione: Questo è quello che ti muovi con noiPamper i nostri ospiti con trattamenti termali professionali come massaggi sportivi, massaggi firma, scrub corpo, avvolge e bagni. Con il vostro senso per le esigenze individuali, si consiglia ai nostri ospiti sui servizi spa e prodotti per la cura della pelle di alta qualità. Fornire esperienze di benessere indimenticabili attraverso la cura di prima classe e il servizio attento. Sostenere il team spa alla reception con la pianificazione degli appuntamenti, assicurando operazioni fluide. Utilizza il tuo flair di vendita per consigliare i prodotti di assistenza domestica adatti, aumentando le entrate termiche. Assicurare i più elevati standard di igiene e sicurezza in tutto il centro benessere e fitness. Questa è la formazione completa come massaggiatore o una qualifica simile nel campo spa e benessere. Ulteriori certificazioni (ad esempio, massaggio tailandese, Shiatsu, Lomi Lomi, riflessologia, drenaggio linfatico) sono un vantaggio. Idealmente, esperienza in corsi di fitness come yoga o Pilates. Esperienza dimostrata nel settore spa, preferibilmente nell'ospitalità di lusso. Eccellente capacità di comunicazione in tedesco e inglese e una sensibilità ai desideri dei nostri ospiti. Flessibilità di lavorare fine settimana, vacanze e eventi speciali come il nostro Night Spa. BenefitsAt Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. • Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale, e numerosi vantaggi.
descriptions.en: Pool Attendant/ Life Guard (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01. ## This is what you move with us Creating perfect pool moments: You ensure smooth operations in the pool and sauna area while keeping every detail in view. A host at heart: With a warm smile, you welcome our guests and look after them attentively throughout the entire spa and pool area. Hygiene at the highest level: You maintain cleanliness and order throughout the spa and carry out daily quality checks. Shaping moments of well-being: With your additional skills in sauna infusions, aqua gym and swimming lessons for our younger guests, you actively contribute to their relaxation experience and joy in the water. ## This is you Holder of the “Brevet Plus Pool” (SLRG) with solid first-aid knowledge. Experience in pool operations as well as skills in conducting sauna infusions, aqua gym and swimming lessons for children. Excellent German and English skills; additional languages are an advantage. An attentive, warm personality with a strong sense of service and that special something that delights guests. ## Benefits At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. • We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. Apply now ## Spa Therapist (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: This is what you move with usPamper our guests with professional spa treatments such as sports massages, signature massages, body scrubs, wraps, and baths.With your sense for individual needs, you will advise our guests on spa services and high-quality skincare products.Provide unforgettable well-being experiences through first-class care and attentive service.Support the spa team at the reception with appointment scheduling, ensuring smooth operations.Use your sales flair to recommend suitable home care products, boosting spa revenue.Ensure the highest hygiene and safety standards throughout the spa and fitness area. This is youCompleted training as a massage therapist or a comparable qualification in the spa and wellness field.Additional certifications (e.g., Thai massage, Shiatsu, Lomi Lomi, reflexology, lymphatic drainage) are an advantage.Ideally, experience in fitness classes such as yoga or Pilates.Proven experience in the spa sector, preferably in luxury hospitality.Excellent communication skills in German and English and a sensitivity to the wishes of our guests.Flexibility to work weekends, holidays, and special events like our Night Spa. BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. • We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. ## Food and Beverage Assistant (m/w/d) Kulm Hotel 100% People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: This is what you move with usIn this versatile key position, you are the “Enabler” of our entire F&B division. You bridge the gap between administrative precision, cutting-edge hospitality technology, and front-of-house operations. You ensure that technical processes run flawlessly in the background while proactively supporting the F&B management in their daily business.Your Mission - Where Culinary Delight meets Logistics:Reservation Management: You are the primary point of contact for reservations (on-site, phone, email) via our software for all hotel outlets.Menu Design & Coordination: In close collaboration with the kitchen, marketing, and restaurant management, you coordinate and update our menus via “Ai-web-to-print.”Daily Operations: During the season, you create daily half-board menus, staff menus, and buffet labeling using “Ai-web-to-print” and “Viewneo.”Guest Experiences: You process individual guest requests for aperitifs or birthdays, ensuring that "extra touch" that defines our service.Amenity Management: Coordinate guest amenities with the Front Office and Room Service, including payment processing via “Saferpay” and “Opera.”Front-Line Support: When needed, you actively support our team directly in service, staying close to our guests.Quality Ambassador: You ensure compliance with the highest standards (LQA and Forbes Travel Guide) and professionally handle guest feedback and complaints.Administrative Excellence: Preparation of corporate invoices and general correspondence (office share approx. 80–90%). This is youFoundation: Completed hotel or commercial apprenticeship, as well as professional experience in a similar role, ideally within the luxury hospitality industry.Linguistic Excellence: Business fluent in German and English (written and spoken). Italian is a significant asset.IT Proficiency: Confident handling of MS Office and hotel systems (e.g., Opera Cloud).Personality: You are an organizational talent with absolute reliability and discretion. You remain calm and solution-oriented, even under high pressure.Host Mindset: You communicate at the highest service level, possess a poised appearance, and apply a “hands-on” mentality when it counts.Why the Kulm Group? • We offer you a workplace where tradition meets innovation. You will have the freedom to actively shape processes and benefit from the attractive perks of one of Switzerland's most renowned hotel groups.Ready to shape the F&B world of tomorrow? We look forward to receiving your application! BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. • We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. ## Chef de Partie - Gardemanger (m/w/d) Kulm Hotel 100% People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: This is what you move with usAt the Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, we don’t just cook, we shape the future of Luxury Mountain Travel. As a Chef de Partie Gardemanger, you are a cornerstone of our kitchen brigade. You bring "Smart Luxury" to the plate, ensuring every dish is as inspiring as the alpine peaks surrounding us. This is your stage to combine craftsmanship with creativity in an international community of excellence.Your Impact: Station Ownership: You take full responsibility for your section, managing it with autonomy and ensuring every plate meets our 5-star standards.Culinary Leadership: You act as a role model, embodying the Kulm principles and inspiring your team through continuous improvement and a "can-do" attitude.Operational Mastery: You organize your workspace with surgical precision and plan daily activities to ensure a flawless service, even during peak hours.Quality Guardian: You uphold the highest health and food safety regulations (HACCP) as a second nature, ensuring the well-being of our guests and colleagues.Agility: You are ready to step up whenever needed, demonstrating true ownership and reliability. This is youBackground: Completed professional culinary training and solid experience in a similar role—ideally within the luxury hospitality or high-end gastronomy sector.Language: You are fluent in English. Any additional languages (German and/or Italian) are a great advantage in our multicultural team.Mindset: You possess excellent time-management skills and stay cool when the heat is on.Spirit: You don't just work in a kitchen; you live for the "Understated Luxury" and the unique life experience that the Engadin offers.Why Kulm Hotel? Be part of a legendary success story. • We offer a dynamic, international environment where your contribution is seen and valued. From structured career growth to the unique perks of the Kulm Group, we provide the platform for you to reach your peak. BenefitsAt the Kulm Group, our employees are the key to our success. We are renowned for our impeccable service as well as our passion for high-end luxury, winter sports, and haute cuisine. With us, you will not only find the perfect platform to advance your career but also an outstanding employee experience with numerous amenities and benefits.
descriptions.de: Schwimmbadmitarbeiter / Rettungsschwimmer (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle. Unsere dynamische und internationale Gemeinschaft bietet unseren Gästen smarten Luxus für ein unvergleichliches Urlaubserlebnis. Als Mitglied der Luxury Kulm Group sind Sie ein Schlüssel zum Erfolg. Organisation und Beratung bei der Gartengestaltung im Außenbereich Pflege der Blumen und Grünpflanzen Beschaffung aller Blumen, Pflanzen und Materialien Konzeptentwicklung und Umsetzung unter Einhaltung des vorgegebenen Budgets ## Das sind Sie Sie haben eine erfolgreich abgeschlossene Ausbildung als Florist/in und mehrere Jahre Berufserfahrung (vorzugsweise in der Hotellerie). Mit kreativem Gespür wissen Sie, wie Sie unsere Gäste mit Ihren Blumenarrangements begeistern und eine beeindruckende Atmosphäre sowie ein einzigartiges Ambiente im und um unser Luxushotel schaffen. Auch unter Druck bleiben Sie ruhig und effizient, mit einem natürlichen und freundlichen Auftreten gegenüber Gästen und Kollegen. Mit Ihrem Gespür für individuelle Bedürfnisse beraten Sie unsere Gäste zu Spa-Services und hochwertigen Hautpflegeprodukten. Unvergessliche Wohlfühlerlebnisse durch erstklassige Pflege und aufmerksamen Service. descriptions.fr: Agent de piscine / Sauveteur (h/f/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadine, Grisons). Temps de travail : 100%. Contrat : poste de 10 mois. Date de début : 1 juin 2026. ## Ce que vous réalisez avec nous Créer des moments parfaits à la piscine : vous assurez le bon fonctionnement de la zone piscine et sauna tout en veillant à chaque détail. Hôte de cœur : avec un sourire chaleureux, vous accueillez nos invités et les accompagnez attentivement tout au long de leur expérience spa et piscine. Hygiène au plus haut niveau : vous maintenez la propreté et l’ordre dans tout le spa et effectuez des contrôles de qualité quotidiens. Créer des instants de bien-être : grâce à vos compétences supplémentaires en infusions de sauna, aqua gym et cours de natation pour nos jeunes invités, vous contribuez activement à leur relaxation et leur plaisir dans l’eau. ## Vous êtes Titulaire du « Brevet Plus Pool » (SLRG) avec de solides connaissances en premiers secours. Expérience dans la gestion de piscine ainsi que compétences en infusions de sauna, aqua gym et cours de natation pour enfants. Excellentes compétences en allemand et en anglais ; d’autres langues sont un avantage. Personnalité attentive, chaleureuse, avec un fort sens du service et ce petit quelque chose qui enchante nos invités. ## Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont le cœur de notre succès. • Nous offrons des opportunités de développement attractives, des hébergements confortables, des repas abordables au restaurant du personnel et de nombreux avantages. Postulez dès maintenant ## Fleuriste (h/f/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Les personnes à 1800 m d’altitude façonnent le voyage de luxe en montagne. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale offre à nos invités un luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inégalée. En tant que membre du groupe de luxe Kulm, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Et à ce titre, nous incarnons notre culture : luxe discret, inspiration et expérience de vie. Ensemble, faisons en sorte que cela devienne réalité. Voici votre chance de rejoindre notre culture de création : Ce que vous apportez avec nous Responsable de tous les arrangements floraux dans notre hôtel, y compris la création de centres de table, bouquets, etc. Décoration des espaces publics non seulement pour un usage quotidien mais aussi pour des occasions spéciales telles que fêtes, galas, événements privés, etc. Organisation et conseil en aménagement paysager extérieur Soins des fleurs et des plantes vertes Approvisionnement en fleurs, plantes et matériaux Développement et mise en œuvre de concepts en respectant le budget fixé ## Vous êtes Vous avez suivi une formation en floristique et disposez de plusieurs années d’expérience (de préférence dans l’hôtellerie). Avec un sens créatif, vous savez comment ravir nos invités avec vos décorations florales et créer une atmosphère impressionnante et une ambiance unique à l’intérieur comme à l’extérieur de notre hôtel de luxe. Vous êtes flexible, appréciez une bonne communication et êtes habitué à travailler de manière autonome. Même sous pression, vous restez calme et efficace, avec une attitude naturelle et amicale envers les invités et collègues. Langues : allemand ou anglais Pourquoi rejoindre le groupe Kulm ? Nous vous offrons une plateforme pour votre créativité dans l’un des endroits les plus exclusifs au monde. Faites partie d’une équipe qui valorise le véritable artisanat, encourage l’initiative et prospère dans une culture de respect mutuel et d’esprit d’équipe. Êtes-vous prêt à faire fleurir le Kulm ? Nous avons hâte de recevoir votre candidature ! Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont le cœur de notre succès. • Nous proposons des opportunités de développement attrayantes, des hébergements confortables, des repas abordables au restaurant du personnel et de nombreux avantages. ## Spa thérapeute (h/f/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Les personnes à 1800 m d’altitude façonnent le voyage de luxe en montagne. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale offre à nos invités un luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inégalée. En tant que membre du groupe de luxe Kulm, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Et à ce titre, nous incarnons notre culture : luxe discret, inspiration et expérience de vie. Ensemble, faisons en sorte que cela devienne réalité. Voici votre chance de rejoindre notre culture de création : Ce que vous apportez avec nous Choyez nos invités avec des soins spa professionnels tels que massages sportifs, massages signature, gommages corporels, enveloppements et bains. Avec votre sensibilité aux besoins individuels, conseillez nos invités sur les services spa et les produits de soin de haute qualité. Offrez des expériences de bien-être inoubliables grâce à des soins de première classe et un service attentif. Soutenez l’équipe spa à la réception dans la planification des rendez-vous, en assurant un fonctionnement fluide. Utilisez votre flair commercial pour recommander des produits de soin adaptés à domicile, augmentant ainsi le chiffre d’affaires du spa. Assurez les normes d’hygiène et de sécurité les plus élevées dans toute la zone spa et fitness. ## Vous êtes Formation complétée en tant que masseur(se) ou qualification équivalente dans le domaine spa et bien-être. Certifications supplémentaires (par ex. massage thaï, Shiatsu, Lomi Lomi, réflexologie, drainage lymphatique) sont un avantage. Idéalement, expérience dans des cours de fitness tels que yoga ou Pilates. Expérience avérée dans le secteur spa, de préférence dans l’hôtellerie de luxe. Excellentes compétences en communication en allemand et en anglais, avec une sensibilité aux souhaits de nos invités. Flexibilité pour travailler les week-ends, jours fériés et événements spéciaux comme notre Night Spa.

descriptions.it: Agente prenotazioni (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Grigioni). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-04-01. # Questo è ciò che ti muovi con noi Gestisci costantemente le prenotazioni per gli ospiti individuali e di gruppo come primo punto di contatto, garantendo il massimo livello di professionalità e attenzione proattiva ai dettagli Mantenere e aggiornare i database degli ospiti con la massima precisione, contribuendo in modo significativo alla soddisfazione degli ospiti e la fedeltà Indirizzo e risolvere i reclami degli ospiti tempestivamente e con sensibilità, sempre trovando la soluzione più adatta in modo discreto ed efficiente Gestisci la comunicazione multicanale, rispondendo a tutte le richieste di postazioni in arrivo Sostenere il Responsabile Prenotazioni con compiti amministrativi, garantire l'aderenza ai nostri elevati standard, e contribuire al miglioramento continuo dei nostri prodotti ## Questo è Charisma e cordialità con un calore naturale e modi raffinati, combinato con un senso acuto per le esigenze degli ospiti esigenti Spirito di squadra e flessibilità, con eccellenti capacità di comunicazione e la capacità di adattarsi in un ambiente di lavoro dinamico Esperienza nell'ospitalità di lusso, con formazione professionale completa e almeno due anni di esperienza in un hotel a 5 stelle in Front Office o Prenotazioni Forte competenze linguistiche in tedesco e inglese (scritto e parlato); lingue aggiuntive come l'italiano sono un vantaggio tecnico Cloud Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale, e numerosi vantaggi. ## Assistant Reservations Manager (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% persone a 1800m sul livello del mare stanno modellando il Luxury Mountain Travel. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti smart Luxury per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. Come membro del gruppo Luxury Kulm fai parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente ispiratore, unico e distintivo. E come tale, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso sobrio, ispirazione e un'esperienza di vita. Insieme, facciamo in modo che accada. Questa è la tua possibilità di essere un membro della nostra cultura di modellazione: Questo è ciò che ti muovi con noiVoi siete la voce del nostro hotel: Sia per telefono o per e-mail, si realizzano offerte interessanti, confermano le prenotazioni e assicurano che i follow-up siano gestiti con precisione – il tutto in linea con gli standard LHW e ISO.
