descriptions.it: Assistant Front Office Manager (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01. ## This is what you move with us Leadership & Partnership: You confidently represent the Front Office Manager and work together to ensure seamless operations at the highest level. The Guest Journey: From a warm welcome to a smooth check-out, you ensure our guests' stay is truly unforgettable. Knowledge Sharing: You contribute your expertise through staff training and performance reviews, while maintaining clear and professional communication with all other departments. Point of Contact: You serve as the primary contact for our guests—competent, proactive, and solution-oriented at all times. Administrative Excellence: You are responsible for statistics and month-end closings, ensuring strict adherence to LHW, Forbes, and Kulm standards. Guest Experience: With your profound knowledge of the hotel and the local region, you inspire our guests and guarantee a unique, world-class experience. ## This is you Education & Experience: You hold a degree in hospitality or business, with at least 3 years of experience in the 5-star luxury hotel segment. Leadership Skills: You possess proven leadership experience and a genuine passion for delivering exceptional service. Personality: You have a sophisticated appearance, a true host’s heart, and find joy in personal guest interaction. Languages: Must-have: Native or bilingual fluency in German and excellent English. Additional languages are a distinct advantage. Start Date: Available from June; we offer both 10-month seasonal or permanent year-round positions. ## Benefits At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. Apply now ## Assistant Reservations Manager (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: This is what you move with usYou are the voice of our hotel: Whether by phone or email, you craft compelling offers, confirm bookings, and ensure follow-ups are handled with precision – all in line with LHW and ISO standards.You think in terms of occupancy and opportunity: You keep our reservations plan accurate and up to date, actively contributing to the optimal utilization of our room inventory.You bring numbers to life: In close collaboration with the Executive Assistant Manager and Front Office Manager, you develop forecasts and reports that are essential for daily planning.You are meticulous with data: Guest profiles and databases are maintained with care and discretion – structure and compliance are part of your DNA.You stay ahead of the curve: From managing the Channel Manager system to continuously refining our ISO and RIMS standards – you ensure smooth operations and bring fresh ideas to the table.You turn potential into performance: Upselling is more than a task to you – it’s a way to enhance the guest journey and create meaningful added value.Why join us? Because you’ll be part of one of Switzerland’s most renowned hotels – a place where you don’t just work, you help shape the future. You’ll be surrounded by passionate professionals and experience a team culture defined by elegance, authenticity, and collaboration. This is youProfessional background: You have completed vocational training in hospitality or a commercial field – ideally within luxury hospitality – and offer several years of relevant experience. Sales mindset: You understand what drives booking decisions and how to elevate the guest experience through strategic room sales. Language skills: You speak and write fluently in German and English; additional knowledge of French or Italian is a plus. Composure & clarity: Whether under pressure or in direct guest communication, you remain professional, efficient, and warm. Drive & growth orientation: You are eager not just to meet expectations but to improve processes and invest in your own development. BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. ## Driver (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: This is what you move with usWarm welcome for our guests: With your natural friendliness and charisma, you make every guest feel at home from the very first moment.Valet parking: You park our guests' vehicles in the underground garage and manage garage logistics, always with attention to detail and order.Guest transfers: Whether it’s from the ski lift or to the restaurant, you handle guest transfers with the hotel shuttle, ensuring a safe and pleasant ride.Guest services: loading/ unloading the guests luggage and handling small errands as needed. This is youNatural Friendliness and Charisma: You can almost anticipate the needs of our discerning guests and make every effort to ensure their stay is as pleasant as possible.Groomed Appearance and Excellent Manners: You represent our hotel with style, impressing with professional politeness and an elegant demeanor.Team Spirit and Flexibility: You enjoy working in a dynamic team, quickly adapting to various demands, always with a smile.Valid Driver's License: Of course, you have a valid driver's license and feel comfortable maneuvering in tight parking spaces and on the road.Language Skills: Ideally, you speak German and English, with additional languages (particularly Italian) being a welcome advantage. BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. ## Team Assistant Concierge and Guest Services (Sommer- & Wintersaison) (m/w/d) Kulm Hotel 100% People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: This is what you move with usHandling Guest Inquiries: You respond to written and telephone inquiries in a professional and service-oriented manner, working in close coordination with the Concierge Team. Administrative Support: You assist the Concierge Team in daily operations by reliably managing administrative tasks and scheduling. Data Management & Documentation: You maintain guest information and internal overviews, ensuring accurate and well-organized documentation of relevant data. Process Optimization: You identify opportunities to streamline workflows and implement minor automation solutions using tools such as Power Automate or Zapier. Backoffice Coordination: You keep track of tasks, deadlines, and internal communication, ensuring a smooth flow of information within the team. Quality Assurance: You help monitor the tools and systems in use and contribute ideas for improving the overall guest service offering. This is youA structured, self-reliant work style with a strong sense of quality, discretion, and reliability. Excellent verbal and written communication skills in German and English – any additional language, especially Italian, is a plus. A passion for organization, strong digital skills, and confident use of MS Office applications. A service-driven mindset: you see yourself as a supportive team member working behind the scenes – and you know that outstanding guest experiences are built on an excellent back office. BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

descriptions.it:
Commis de Cuisine  (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-05.

## This is what you move with us
Tasks It is not just about cooking; it is about contributing to a culinary symphony in an environment of the highest 5-star superior standards.Station Excellence: You support your Chef de Partie in the daily "Mise en place" and the service for our renowned outlets, ensuring every plate meets our aesthetic and gustatory expectations.
Precision in Execution: Whether it is delicate appetizers or sophisticated garnishes—you prepare components with mastery, speed, and a deep respect for the product.
Quality & Consistency: You oversee the correct storage of raw materials and guarantee absolute freshness. Order and uncompromising hygiene (HACCP) are your professional calling card.
Collaborative Spirit: You are an integral part of the brigade. When the pressure rises, you keep a cool head and actively support your colleagues to maintain our legendary excellence.

## This is you
We are looking for a passionate culinary talent who thrives on the energy of a high-end kitchen. You don't just follow recipes; you understand the soul of fine dining:Education: You are a certified chef or have at least 2 years of solid professional experience in high-end gastronomy or luxury hotellerie.
Skills: You have mastered fundamental cooking techniques (sautéing, poaching, braising) and possess excellent knife skills.
Mindset: You implement the hotel’s standard recipes with confidence and have a sharp eye for detail and continuous improvement.
Reliability: Punctuality, a professional appearance, and a clean, organized workspace are second nature to you.
Languages: Italian is required, as well as a good command of English or German.
Would you like to bring your passion into our kitchen at the Grand Hotel Kronenhof? We look forward to receiving your application!

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Commis de Bar  (m/w/d)
Kulm Hotel
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usAs Commis de Bar, you support our bartenders in making every evening an unforgettable performance:Atmosphere with Soul: You prepare the bar so that our guests feel the exclusive flair the moment they walk in—where every detail matters.Liquid Art: You assist in the creation and elegant service of drinks and cocktails that perfectly reflect our exacting Kulm standards.The Art of Hosting: You ensure that "wow-moment" both behind and in front of the bar, making sure our guests feel completely at home.Storytelling in a Glass: With charm and expertise, you advise our guests and provide authentic recommendations from our exquisite beverage selection.Behind the Scenes: You ensure smooth operations and pay meticulous attention to maintaining our high hygiene and quality standards.
This is youThe Foundation: Ideally, you have completed a degree or apprenticeship in hospitality or gastronomy.Initial Bar Experience: You know your way around a shaker, understand the basics of mixology, and have already gained some initial experience behind a bar.A Taste for Excellence: You have a basic understanding of spirits and—as a real bonus—you are interested in the sophisticated world of cigars.Language Talents: Our guests are international. You communicate confidently in German and English. If you also speak Italian, that’s the "olive in the martini."Passion: You live for excellent service, possess a sophisticated appearance, and maintain your elegance even when the house is full.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Cook - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
Your MissionYour stage – our heart behind the scenes: At our hotel, it's not just our guests who take center stage – our employees also deserve culinary moments that inspire. As Cook in our newly established Staff Restaurant, you are both host and culinary expert. With fresh, creative cuisine and an open ear for the wishes of our team, you help ensure that our colleagues feel truly at home. Your Responsibilities  Preparation of varied, balanced menus for our team – with attention to detail and a passion for quality Being a host in the staff restaurant: welcoming, engaging, and creating a positive atmosphere  Menu planning and implementation of culinary theme weeks – your ideas are welcome Combination of buffet service and live cooking Ensuring smooth operations in your section – from mise en place to spotless kitchen closure Adherence to hygiene regulations according to HACCP – cleanliness is second nature to you Close collaboration with the kitchen team, purchasing, and HR – to ensure a great experience for our crew
This is youCompleted training as a certified chef or equivalent qualification Experience in both hot and cold kitchen, ideally in communal catering or the hotel industry A passion for working with people – you enjoy being a host, even for your colleagues Strong organizational skills, resilience, and a structured working style Creativity in menu planning – seasonal, balanced, and full of flavor Good German and English skills, Italian is a plus If you’d like to combine your love for culinary arts with a true host mentality – and contribute to one of the most beautiful hotels in Switzerland – we look forward to receiving your application.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Maître de Rang (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            Elevate your career to new heights at 1800 meters above sea level and become part of the Kulm Group family.  Are you ready to redefine the luxury mountain travel experience? Join our dynamic and international team at Kulm Group, where together we provide our guests with a unique luxury experience and create unforgettable memories.  Why Kulm Group?Pursuit of Excellence: Excellence is at the heart of everything we do. We strive daily to achieve the best and delight our guests and employees.Passionate Team: Work in a vibrant, international team that supports and inspires each other. Experience true camaraderie and team spirit with us.Career Opportunities: Unlock your potential and grow with us. We are committed to your personal and professional development.Unique Culture: Immerse yourself in a work environment that values creativity, passion, and authenticity. Here, you can bring your ideas to life and make a real impact.  Be part of something extraordinary!
This is what you move with usYou confidently manage your section, ensuring seamless service with a smile and attention to detail.You coordinate your team, delegate tasks, and guarantee flawless execution.You are a true host at heart, advising our international guests on menu and wine pairings.You take on administrative tasks such as shift planning and order management with efficiency and structure.You introduce fresh ideas and create innovative guest experiences that leave a lasting impression.You share your expertise with your team, continuously fostering training and development.
This is youA completed education in fine dining and experience in luxury hospitality or high-end gastronomy.Leadership experience and the ability to motivate and inspire your team to excellence.Outstanding communication skills and enthusiasm for working with an international clientele.Strong organizational skills, a high sense of quality, and a drive to set new standards.Flexibility, resilience, and a passion for delivering exceptional service.Fluency in German and English is essential; additional languages are a plus.Set new standards in fine dining and become part of our team. We look forward to your application!
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

If you also speak Italian, that’s the "olive in the martini."Passion: You live for excellent service, possess a sophisticated appearance, and maintain your elegance even when the house is full.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Cook - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
Your MissionYour stage – our heart behind the scenes: At our hotel, it's not just our guests who take center stage – our employees also deserve culinary moments that inspire. As Cook in our newly established Staff Restaurant, you are both host and culinary expert. With fresh, creative cuisine and an open ear for the wishes of our team, you help ensure that our colleagues feel truly at home. Your Responsibilities  Preparation of varied, balanced menus for our team – with attention to detail and a passion for quality Being a host in the staff restaurant: welcoming, engaging, and creating a positive atmosphere  Menu planning and implementation of culinary theme weeks – your ideas are welcome Combination of buffet service and live cooking Ensuring smooth operations in your section – from mise en place to spotless kitchen closure Adherence to hygiene regulations according to HACCP – cleanliness is second nature to you Close collaboration with the kitchen team, purchasing, and HR – to ensure a great experience for our crew
This is youCompleted training as a certified chef or equivalent qualification Experience in both hot and cold kitchen, ideally in communal catering or the hotel industry A passion for working with people – you enjoy being a host, even for your colleagues Strong organizational skills, resilience, and a structured working style Creativity in menu planning – seasonal, balanced, and full of flavor Good German and English skills, Italian is a plus If you’d like to combine your love for culinary arts with a true host mentality – and contribute to one of the most beautiful hotels in Switzerland – we look forward to receiving your application.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Maître de Rang (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            Elevate your career to new heights at 1800 meters above sea level and become part of the Kulm Group family.  Are you ready to redefine the luxury mountain travel experience? Join our dynamic and international team at Kulm Group, where together we provide our guests with a unique luxury experience and create unforgettable memories.  Why Kulm Group?Pursuit of Excellence: Excellence is at the heart of everything we do. We strive daily to achieve the best and delight our guests and employees.Passionate Team: Work in a vibrant, international team that supports and inspires each other. Experience true camaraderie and team spirit with us.Career Opportunities: Unlock your potential and grow with us. We are committed to your personal and professional development.Unique Culture: Immerse yourself in a work environment that values creativity, passion, and authenticity. Here, you can bring your ideas to life and make a real impact.  Be part of something extraordinary!
This is what you move with usYou confidently manage your section, ensuring seamless service with a smile and attention to detail.You coordinate your team, delegate tasks, and guarantee flawless execution.You are a true host at heart, advising our international guests on menu and wine pairings.You take on administrative tasks such as shift planning and order management with efficiency and structure.You introduce fresh ideas and create innovative guest experiences that leave a lasting impression.You share your expertise with your team, continuously fostering training and development.
This is youA completed education in fine dining and experience in luxury hospitality or high-end gastronomy.Leadership experience and the ability to motivate and inspire your team to excellence.Outstanding communication skills and enthusiasm for working with an international clientele.Strong organizational skills, a high sense of quality, and a drive to set new standards.Flexibility, resilience, and a passion for delivering exceptional service.Fluency in German and English is essential; additional languages are a plus.Set new standards in fine dining and become part of our team. We look forward to your application!
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.
descriptions.fr:
Commis de Cuisine  (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-05.

## This is what you move with us
Tasks It is not just about cooking; it is about contributing to a culinary symphony in an environment of the highest 5-star superior standards.Station Excellence: You support your Chef de Partie in the daily "Mise en place" and the service for our renowned outlets, ensuring every plate meets our aesthetic and gustatory expectations.
Precision in Execution: Whether it is delicate appetizers or sophisticated garnishes—you prepare components with mastery, speed, and a deep respect for the product.
Quality & Consistency: You oversee the correct storage of raw materials and guarantee absolute freshness. Order and uncompromising hygiene (HACCP) are your professional calling card.
Collaborative Spirit: You are an integral part of the brigade. When the pressure rises, you keep a cool head and actively support your colleagues to maintain our legendary excellence.

## This is you
We are looking for a passionate culinary talent who thrives on the energy of a high-end kitchen. You don't just follow recipes; you understand the soul of fine dining:Education: You are a certified chef or have at least 2 years of solid professional experience in high-end gastronomy or luxury hotellerie.
Skills: You have mastered fundamental cooking techniques (sautéing, poaching, braising) and possess excellent knife skills.
Mindset: You implement the hotel’s standard recipes with confidence and have a sharp eye for detail and continuous improvement.
Reliability: Punctuality, a professional appearance, and a clean, organized workspace are second nature to you.
Languages: Italian is required, as well as a good command of English or German.
Would you like to bring your passion into our kitchen at the Grand Hotel Kronenhof? We look forward to receiving your application!

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

descriptions.it: Commis de Cuisine (lunedì/mercoledì) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadina, Grigioni). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / contratto di 10 mesi. Stellenantritt: 05-06-2026. ## Questo è ciò che sposti con noi Compiti Non si tratta solo di cucinare; Si tratta di contribuire a una sinfonia culinaria in un ambiente con i più alti standard a 5 stelle. Eccellenza della Stazione Centrale: Supporti il tuo Chef de Partie nella "Mise en place" quotidiana e nel servizio per i nostri rinomati outlet, assicurandoti che ogni piatto rispetti le nostre aspettative estetiche e gustative. Precisione nell'esecuzione: Che si tratti di antipasti delicati o guarnizioni sofisticate—si preparano i componenti con maestria, rapidità e un profondo rispetto per il prodotto. Qualità e Consistenza: Supervisioni la corretta conservazione delle materie prime e garantisci una freschezza assoluta. L'ordine e l'igiene senza compromessi (HACCP) sono il tuo biglietto da visita professionale. Collaborative Spirit: Sei una parte integrante della brigata. Quando la pressione aumenta, mantieni la calma e supporti attivamente i tuoi colleghi per mantenere la nostra leggendaria eccellenza. ## Questo sei te. Cerchiamo un talento culinario appassionato che prosperi grazie all'energia di una cucina di alto livello. Non si seguono solo le ricette; Comprendi l'anima della cucina raffinata:Formazione: Sei uno chef certificato o hai almeno 2 anni di solida esperienza professionale nella gastronomia di alto livello o nell'hoteleria di lusso. Abilità: Hai padroneggiato tecniche di cucina fondamentali (saltate, popolatura, brasatura) e possiedi eccellenti abilità con il coltello. Mentalità: Implementi con sicurezza le ricette standard dell'hotel e hai un occhio attento ai dettagli e al miglioramento continuo. Affidabilità: Puntualità, un aspetto professionale e uno spazio di lavoro pulito e organizzato sono per te una seconda natura. Lingue: è richiesto l'italiano, oltre a una buona padronanza dell'inglese o del tedesco. Vuoi portare la tua passione nella nostra cucina al Grand Hotel Kronenhof? Non vediamo l'ora di ricevere la tua candidatura! ## Benefici Al Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo opportunità di sviluppo attraenti, alloggi confortevoli, pasti accessibili nel ristorante del personale e numerosi vantaggi. Candidati ora ## Commis de Bar (lunedì/mercoledì/d) Hotel Kulm 100% Le persone a 1800 m sul livello del mare stanno modellando il Luxury Mountain Travel. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti un lusso intelligente per un'esperienza natalizia inimitabile. Come membro del Luxury Kulm Group sei parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente ispiratore, unico e distintivo. E così, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso sobrio, ispirazione e un'esperienza di vita. Insieme, lo facciamo accadere. Questa è la tua occasione per far parte della nostra cultura di modellazione: questo è ciò che muovi con noi. Come Commis de Bar, supporti i nostri baristi nel rendere ogni serata una performance indimenticabile: Atmosfera con Anima: Prepari il bar in modo che i nostri ospiti sentano il tocco esclusivo appena entrano—dove ogni dettaglio conta. Arte Liquida: Aiuti nella creazione e nel servizio elegante di bevande e cocktail che riflettono perfettamente i nostri rigorosi standard Kulm. L'arte di ospitare: Ti assicuri quel "momento wow" sia dietro che davanti al bancone, assicurandoti che i nostri ospiti si sentano completamente a casa. Raccontare storie in un bicchiere: Con fascino e competenza, consigli i nostri ospiti e fornisci raccomandazioni autentiche dalla nostra squisita selezione di bevande. Dietro le quinte: Garantite operazioni senza intoppi e prestate molta attenzione al mantenimento dei nostri elevati standard di igiene e qualità. Questo è te. La Fondazione: Idealmente, hai completato una specializzazione o un apprendistato in ospitalità o gastronomia. Esperienza iniziale al bar: conosci il shaker, conosci le basi della mixology e hai già acquisito una certa esperienza iniziale dietro un bar. Un gusto per l'eccellenza: Hai una conoscenza di base degli alcolici e—come vero bonus—sei interessato al sofisticato mondo dei sigari. Language Talents: I nostri ospiti sono internazionali. Comunichi con sicurezza in tedesco e inglese. Se parli anche italiano, quello è l'"oliva nel martini". Passione: Vivi per un servizio eccellente, possiedi un aspetto sofisticato e mantieni la tua eleganza anche quando la casa è piena. Benefici Al Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo opportunità di sviluppo attraenti, alloggi confortevoli, pasti accessibili nel ristorante del personale e numerosi vantaggi. ## Cuoco - Ristorante Personale (lunedì/mercoledì) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Persone a 1800 m sul livello del mare stanno modellando il Viaggio di Lusso in Montagna. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti un lusso intelligente per un'esperienza natalizia inimitabile. Come membro del Luxury Kulm Group sei parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente ispiratore, unico e distintivo. E così, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso sobrio, ispirazione e un'esperienza di vita. Insieme, lo facciamo accadere. Questa è la tua occasione per far parte della nostra cultura in formazione: La tua missione Il tuo palco – il nostro cuore dietro le quinte: Nel nostro hotel, non sono solo i nostri ospiti a prendere il centro della scena – anche i nostri dipendenti meritano momenti culinari che ispirino. Come cuoco nel nostro neonato ristorante per il personale, sei sia ospite che esperto culinario. Con una cucina fresca e creativa e un orecchio aperto ai desideri del nostro team, aiuti a garantire che i nostri colleghi si sentano davvero a casa. Le tue responsabilità Preparazione di menù vari ed equilibrati per il nostro team – con attenzione ai dettagli e passione per la qualità Essere un ospite nel ristorante dello staff: accogliente, coinvolgente e creare un'atmosfera positiva Pianificazione del menu e implementazione di settimane a tema culinario – le tue idee sono benvenute Combinazione di servizio buffet e cucina dal vivo Garantire un funzionamento fluido nella tua sezione – dalla mise en place alla chiusura impeccabile della cucina Rispetto delle normative di higiene secondo l'HACCP – La pulizia è per te una seconda natura. Stretta collaborazione con il team di cucina, gli acquisti e le risorse umane – per garantire un'ottima esperienza al nostro team. Questo sei tuo. Formazione completata come chef certificato o qualifica equivalente. Esperienza sia in cucina calda che fredda, idealmente nel catering comunitario o nell'industria alberghiera. Una passione per lavorare con le persone – ti piace essere un host, anche per i tuoi colleghi Forti capacità organizzative, resilienza e uno stile di lavoro strutturato Creatività nella pianificazione dei menù – stagionale, equilibrata e ricca di sapore Buone competenze in tedesco e inglese, l'italiano è un vantaggio Se vuoi unire la tua passione per le arti culinarie con una vera mentalità di ospite – e contribuire a uno degli hotel più belli della Svizzera – attendiamo con piacere di ricevere la tua candidatura. Benefici Al Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo opportunità di sviluppo attraenti, alloggi confortevoli, pasti accessibili nel ristorante del personale e numerosi vantaggi. ## Maître de Rang (lun/mercoledì/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof al 100% Eleva la tua carriera a nuovi livelli a 1800 metri sul livello del mare e diventa parte della famiglia Kulm Group. Sei pronto a ridefinire l'esperienza di viaggio di lusso in montagna? Unisciti al nostro team dinamico e internazionale del Kulm Group, dove insieme offriamo ai nostri ospiti un'esperienza di lusso unica e creiamo ricordi indimenticabili. Perché il Gruppo Kulm? Ricerca dell'Eccellenza: L'eccellenza è al centro di tutto ciò che facciamo. Ogni giorno ci impegniamo a ottenere il meglio e a deliziare i nostri ospiti e dipendenti. Team appassionato: Lavora in un team internazionale vivace che si supporta e si ispira a vicenda. Vivi con noi la vera cameratismo e lo spirito di squadra. Opportunità di carriera: sblocca il tuo potenziale e cresci con noi. Siamo impegnati nel tuo sviluppo personale e professionale. Cultura unica: immergiti in un ambiente di lavoro che valorizza creatività, passione e autenticità. Qui puoi dare vita alle tue idee e lasciare un impatto reale. Fai parte di qualcosa di straordinario! Questo è ciò che sposti con noi: gestisci la tua sezione con sicurezza, garantendo un servizio senza soluzione di continuità con un sorriso e attenzione ai dettagli. Coordini il tuo team, deleghi i compiti e garantisci un'esecuzione impeccabile. Sei un vero ospite nel cuore, consigliando i nostri ospiti internazionali su menu e abbinamenti di vino. Ti occupi di compiti amministrativi come la pianificazione dei turni e la gestione degli ordini con efficienza e struttura. Introduci idee nuove e crei esperienze innovative per gli ospiti che lasciano un'impressione duratura. Condividi la tua esperienza con il tuo team, promuovendo continuamente formazione e sviluppo. Questa è la tua formazione completa in alta cucina ed esperienza nell'ospitalità di lusso o nella gastronomia di alto livello. Esperienza di leadership e la capacità di motivare e ispirare il tuo team all'eccellenza. Eccezionali capacità comunicative ed entusiasmo per lavorare con una clientela internazionale. Forti capacità organizzative, un alto senso di qualità e la volontà di stabilire nuovi standard. Flessibilità, resilienza e passione per offrire un servizio eccezionale. La padronanza di tedesco e inglese è essenziale; Lingue aggiuntive sono un vantaggio. Stabilisci nuovi standard nella cucina raffinata e diventa parte del nostro team. Non vediamo l'ora di ricevere la tua candidatura! Benefici Al Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo opportunità di sviluppo attraenti, alloggi confortevoli, pasti accessibili nel ristorante del personale e numerosi vantaggi.

BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. ## Maître de Rang (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Elevate your career to new heights at 1800 meters above sea level and become part of the Kulm Group family. Are you ready to redefine the luxury mountain travel experience? Join our dynamic and international team at Kulm Group, where together we provide our guests with a unique luxury experience and create unforgettable memories. Why Kulm Group?Pursuit of Excellence: Excellence is at the heart of everything we do. We strive daily to achieve the best and delight our guests and employees.Passionate Team: Work in a vibrant, international team that supports and inspires each other. Experience true camaraderie and team spirit with us.Career Opportunities: Unlock your potential and grow with us. We are committed to your personal and professional development.Unique Culture: Immerse yourself in a work environment that values creativity, passion, and authenticity. Here, you can bring your ideas to life and make a real impact. Be part of something extraordinary! This is what you move with usYou confidently manage your section, ensuring seamless service with a smile and attention to detail.You coordinate your team, delegate tasks, and guarantee flawless execution.You are a true host at heart, advising our international guests on menu and wine pairings.You take on administrative tasks such as shift planning and order management with efficiency and structure.You introduce fresh ideas and create innovative guest experiences that leave a lasting impression.You share your expertise with your team, continuously fostering training and development. This is youA completed education in fine dining and experience in luxury hospitality or high-end gastronomy.Leadership experience and the ability to motivate and inspire your team to excellence.Outstanding communication skills and enthusiasm for working with an international clientele.Strong organizational skills, a high sense of quality, and a drive to set new standards.Flexibility, resilience, and a passion for delivering exceptional service.Fluency in German and English is essential; additional languages are a plus.Set new standards in fine dining and become part of our team. We look forward to your application! BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

descriptions.fr: Commis de Cuisine (lun/mercredi) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadine, Grisons). Pensum : 100 %. Vertrag : 10-Monats-Stelle / contrat de 10 mois. Stellenantritt : 05-06-2026. ## C’est ce que tu déplaces avec nous Tâches Ce n’est pas seulement une question de cuisine ; Il s’agit de contribuer à une symphonie culinaire dans un environnement aux plus hauts standards 5 étoiles. Excellence de la station : Vous soutenez votre Chef de Partie dans la « mise en place » quotidienne et le service pour nos établissements renommés, en veillant à ce que chaque assiette réponde à nos attentes esthétiques et gustatives. Précision dans l’exécution : Qu’il s’agisse d’entrées délicates ou de garnitures sophistiquées — vous préparez les composants avec maîtrise, rapidité et un profond respect pour le produit. Qualité et Constance : Vous veillez au stockage correct des matières premières et garantissez une fraîcheur absolue. L’ordre et l’hygiène sans compromis (HACCP) sont votre carte de visite professionnelle. Esprit collaboratif : Vous faites partie intégrante de la brigade. Quand la pression monte, vous gardez la tête froide et soutenez activement vos collègues pour maintenir notre excellence légendaire. ## C’est vous Nous recherchons un talent culinaire passionné qui s’épanouit grâce à l’énergie d’une cuisine haut de gamme. On ne se contente pas de suivre des recettes ; Vous comprenez l’âme de la haute gastronomie : Formation : Vous êtes chef certifié ou vous avez au moins 2 ans d’expérience professionnelle solide dans la gastronomie haut de gamme ou l’hôtelerie de luxe. Compétences : Vous maîtrisez les techniques de cuisine de base (sauté, poché, braisage) et possédez d’excellentes compétences au couteau. Mentalité : Vous mettez en œuvre les recettes standards de l’hôtel avec confiance et avez un œil aiguisé pour le détail et l’amélioration continue. Fiabilité : La ponctualité, une apparence professionnelle et un espace de travail propre et organisé sont une seconde nature pour vous. Langues : l’italien est requis, ainsi qu’une bonne maîtrise de l’anglais ou de l’allemand. Souhaitez-vous apporter votre passion dans notre cuisine au Grand Hôtel Kronenhof ? Nous attendons avec impatience votre candidature ! ## Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous proposons des opportunités de développement attractives, des hébergements confortables, des repas abordables dans le restaurant du personnel, ainsi que de nombreux avantages. Postulez dès maintenant ## Commis de Bar (lun/mercredi/j) Hôtel Kulm, 100 % Les personnes situées à 1800 m d’altitude façonnent le voyage de luxe en montagne. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale offre à nos invités un luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inimitable. En tant que membre du groupe Luxury Kulm, vous faites partie intégrante de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et unique. Et ainsi, nous embrassons notre culture : le luxe discret, l’inspiration et une expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous y parvenons. C’est votre chance de faire partie de notre culture de formation : c’est ce que vous déplacez avec nous. En tant que Commis de Bar, vous accompagnez nos barmans pour faire de chaque soirée une performance inoubliable : Ambiance avec âme : Vous préparez le bar pour que nos clients ressentent l’exclusivité dès leur entrée — là où chaque détail compte. Art liquide : Vous participez à la création et au service élégant de boissons et cocktails qui reflètent parfaitement nos standards exigeants de Kulm. L’art d’accueillir : Vous vous assurez de ce « moment wow » à la fois derrière et devant le bar, en veillant à ce que nos invités se sentent complètement chez eux. Raconter des histoires dans un verre : Avec charme et expertise, vous conseillez nos clients et fournissez des recommandations authentiques issues de notre sélection exquise de boissons. Dans les coulisses : Vous veillez au bon fonctionnement et portez une attention méticuleuse au maintien de nos normes élevées d’hygiène et de qualité. Voici vous. La Fondation : idéalement, vous avez obtenu un diplôme ou un apprentissage en hôtellerie ou en gastronomie. Expérience initiale au bar : Vous maîtrisez bien un shaker, comprenez les bases de la mixologie et avez déjà acquis une certaine expérience initiale derrière un bar. Un goût pour l’excellence : Vous avez une compréhension de base des spiritueux et—en plus d’un vrai bonus—vous vous intéressez au monde sophistiqué des cigares. Talents linguistiques : Nos invités sont internationaux. Vous communiquez avec assurance en allemand et en anglais. Si vous parlez aussi italien, c’est « l’olive dans le martini ». Passion : Vous vivez pour un service d’excellence, vous avez une apparence sophistiquée et vous maintenez votre élégance même lorsque la maison est pleine. Avantages sociaux Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont le cœur de notre succès. Nous proposons des opportunités de développement attractives, des hébergements confortables, des repas abordables dans le restaurant du personnel, ainsi que de nombreux avantages. ## Cuisinier - Restaurant du personnel (lundi/mercredi/j) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100 % Des personnes situées à 1800 m d’altitude façonnent le Luxury Mountain Travel. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale offre à nos invités un luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inimitable. En tant que membre du groupe Luxury Kulm, vous faites partie intégrante de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et unique. Et ainsi, nous embrassons notre culture : le luxe discret, l’inspiration et une expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous y parvenons. C’est votre chance de faire partie de notre culture en formation : votre missionVotre scène – notre cœur dans les coulisses : Dans notre hôtel, ce ne sont pas seulement nos clients qui occupent le devant de la scène – nos employés méritent aussi des moments culinaires inspirants. En tant que cuisinier dans notre restaurant du personnel nouvellement créé, vous êtes à la fois hôte et expert culinaire. Avec une cuisine fraîche et créative et une oreille attentive aux souhaits de notre équipe, vous contribuez à ce que nos collègues se sentent vraiment chez eux. Vos responsabilités Préparation de menus variés et équilibrés pour notre équipe – avec attention aux détails et passion pour la qualité Être hôte dans le restaurant du personnel : accueillant, engageant et créer une atmosphère positive Planification du menu et mise en œuvre de semaines à thème culinaire – vos idées sont les bienvenues Combinaison de buffet et cuisine en direct Garantir un bon fonctionnement dans votre section – de la mise en place à la fermeture impeccable, respect des réglementations d’hygiène selon le HACCP – La propreté est une seconde nature pour vous Collaboration étroite avec l’équipe de cuisine, les achats et les ressources humaines – pour garantir une excellente expérience à notre équipe Voici votre formation en tant que chef certifié ou équivalent Expérience en cuisine chaude et froide, idéalement dans la restauration collective ou l’industrie hôtelière Une passion pour le travail avec les gens – vous aimez être hôte, même pour vos collègues : solides compétences organisationnelles, résilience et un style de travail structuré, créativité dans la planification des menus – saisonnier, équilibrée et pleine de saveurs. De bonnes compétences en allemand et en anglais, l’italien, c’est un plus. Si vous souhaitez allier votre passion pour les arts culinaires à une véritable mentalité d’hôte – et contribuer à l’un des plus beaux hôtels de Suisse – nous attendons avec impatience votre candidature. Avantages sociaux Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont le cœur de notre succès. Nous proposons des opportunités de développement attractives, des hébergements confortables, des repas abordables dans le restaurant du personnel, ainsi que de nombreux avantages. ## Maître de Rang (l/mercredi) Grand Hôtel Kronenhof à 100 % Faites évoluer votre carrière à 1800 mètres d’altitude et rejoignez la famille du groupe Kulm. Êtes-vous prêt à redéfinir l’expérience de voyage en montagne de luxe ? Rejoignez notre équipe dynamique et internationale du groupe Kulm, où ensemble nous offrons à nos clients une expérience de luxe unique et créons des souvenirs inoubliables. Pourquoi le groupe Kulm ? Poursuite de l’excellence : L’excellence est au cœur de tout ce que nous faisons. Nous nous efforçons chaque jour d’atteindre le meilleur et de ravir nos clients et employés. Équipe passionnée : Travailler au sein d’une équipe internationale dynamique qui se soutient et s’inspire mutuellement. Vivez une véritable camaraderie et un esprit d’équipe avec nous. Opportunités de carrière : Libérez votre potentiel et évoluez avec nous. Nous nous engageons à soutenir votre développement personnel et professionnel. Culture unique : Immergez-vous dans un environnement de travail qui valorise la créativité, la passion et l’authenticité. Ici, vous pouvez donner vie à vos idées et avoir un véritable impact. Faites partie de quelque chose d’extraordinaire ! C’est ce que vous transportez avec nous. Vous gérez votre section avec assurance, garantissant un service fluide avec un sourire et une attention aux détails. Vous coordonnez votre équipe, déléguez les tâches et garantissez une exécution parfaite. Vous êtes un véritable hôte dans l’âme, conseillant nos invités internationaux sur les accords au menu et aux vins. Vous prenez en charge des tâches administratives telles que la planification des équipes et la gestion des commandes avec efficacité et structure. Vous introduisez des idées inédites et créez des expériences clients innovantes qui laissent une impression durable. Vous partagez votre expertise avec votre équipe, en favorisant continuellement la formation et le développement. Voici une formation complète en haute gastronomie et une expérience en hôtellerie de luxe ou en gastronomie haut de gamme. Expérience en leadership et capacité à motiver et inspirer votre équipe à l’excellence. Compétences remarquables en communication et enthousiasme pour travailler avec une clientèle internationale. De solides compétences organisationnelles, un haut sens de la qualité et une volonté de fixer de nouvelles normes. Flexibilité, résilience et passion pour offrir un service exceptionnel. La maîtrise de l’allemand et de l’anglais est essentielle ; Des langues supplémentaires sont un plus. Établissez de nouveaux standards en haute gastronomie et rejoignez notre équipe. Nous attendons votre candidature avec impatience ! Avantages sociaux Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont le cœur de notre succès. Nous proposons des opportunités de développement attractives, des hébergements confortables, des repas abordables dans le restaurant du personnel, ainsi que de nombreux avantages.

descriptions.it: Cook - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadina, Grigioni). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Stagionale. Stellenantritt: 15-12-2025. ## La tua missione Il tuo palcoscenico – il nostro cuore dietro le quinte: nel nostro hotel, non sono solo i nostri ospiti a essere al centro dell'attenzione: i nostri dipendenti meritano anche momenti culinari che ispirino. Come cuoco nel nostro nuovo Staff Restaurant, sei sia host che esperto di cucina. Con una cucina fresca e creativa e un orecchio aperto per i desideri del nostro team, contribuisci a garantire che i nostri colleghi si sentano veramente a casa. Le tue responsabilità Preparazione di menu vari ed equilibrati per il nostro team – con attenzione ai dettagli e passione per la qualità Essere un host nel ristorante del personale: accogliente, coinvolgente e creare un'atmosfera positiva Pianificazione del menu e implementazione di settimane a tema culinario – le tue idee sono benvenute Combinazione di servizio a buffet e cucina dal vivo Garantire operazioni senza intoppi nella tua sezione – dalla mise en place alla chiusura impeccabile della cucina Rispetto delle norme igieniche secondo l'HACCP – la pulizia è una seconda natura per te Stretta collaborazione con il team di cucina, gli acquisti e le risorse umane – per garantire una grande esperienza per il nostro equipaggio ## Questo sei tu Formazione completa come chef certificato o qualifica equivalente Esperienza nella cucina calda e fredda, idealmente nella ristorazione collettiva o nel settore alberghiero Una passione per il lavoro con le persone – ti piace essere un host, anche per i tuoi colleghi Forte La nostra community dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti Smart Luxury per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. In qualità di membro del Gruppo Luxury Kulm, fai parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente stimolante, unico e distintivo. E come tale, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso discreto, ispirazione e un'esperienza di vita. Insieme, lo realizziamo. Questa è la tua occasione per essere un membro della nostra cultura modellante: Questo è ciò che ti muovi con noi Come Commis de Bar, supporti i nostri baristi nel rendere ogni serata uno spettacolo indimenticabile:Atmosfera con anima: prepari il bar in modo che i nostri ospiti sentano il fascino esclusivo nel momento in cui camminano, dove ogni dettaglio è importante. Arte liquida: assisti nella creazione e nel servizio elegante di bevande e cocktail che riflettono perfettamente i nostri rigorosi standard Kulm. Arte dell'ospitalità: ti assicuri che "wow-moment" sia dietro che davanti al bar, assicurandoti che i nostri ospiti si sentano completamente a casa. Raccontare storie in un bicchiere: con fascino e competenza, consigli i nostri ospiti e fornisci consigli autentici dalla nostra squisita selezione di bevande. Dietro le quinte: garantisci operazioni senza intoppi e presti meticolosa attenzione al mantenimento dei nostri elevati standard di igiene e qualità. Questo sei tuLe fondamenta: idealmente, hai completato una laurea o un apprendistato in ospitalità o gastronomia.Esperienza iniziale del bar: sai come usare uno shaker, comprendi le basi della mixology e hai già acquisito alcune conoscenze iniziali
descriptions.en: Cook - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2025-12-15. ## Your Mission Your stage – our heart behind the scenes: At our hotel, it's not just our guests who take center stage – our employees also deserve culinary moments that inspire. As Cook in our newly established Staff Restaurant, you are both host and culinary expert. With fresh, creative cuisine and an open ear for the wishes of our team, you help ensure that our colleagues feel truly at home. Your Responsibilities Preparation of varied, balanced menus for our team – with attention to detail and a passion for quality Being a host in the staff restaurant: welcoming, engaging, and creating a positive atmosphere Menu planning and implementation of culinary theme weeks – your ideas are welcome Combination of buffet service and live cooking Ensuring smooth operations in your section – from mise en place to spotless kitchen closure Adherence to hygiene regulations according to HACCP – cleanliness is second nature to you Close collaboration with the kitchen team, purchasing, and HR – to ensure a great experience for our crew ## This is you Completed training as a certified chef or equivalent qualification Experience in both hot and cold kitchen, ideally in communal catering or the hotel industry A passion for working with people – you enjoy being a host, even for your colleagues Strong organizational skills, resilience, and a structured working style Creativity in menu planning – seasonal, balanced, and full of flavor languages: Italian preferred, or German or English If you’d like to combine your love for culinary arts with a true host mentality – and contribute to one of the most beautiful hotels in Switzerland – we look forward to receiving your application. ## Benefits At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. Apply now ## Commis de Cuisine (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: This is what you move with usTasks It is not just about cooking; it is about contributing to a culinary symphony in an environment of the highest 5-star superior standards.Station Excellence: You support your Chef de Partie in the daily "Mise en place" and the service for our renowned outlets, ensuring every plate meets our aesthetic and gustatory expectations.Precision in Execution: Whether it is delicate appetizers or sophisticated garnishes—you prepare components with mastery, speed, and a deep respect for the product.Quality & Consistency: You oversee the correct storage of raw materials and guarantee absolute freshness. Order and uncompromising hygiene (HACCP) are your professional calling card.Collaborative Spirit: You are an integral part of the brigade. When the pressure rises, you keep a cool head and actively support your colleagues to maintain our legendary excellence. This is youWe are looking for a passionate culinary talent who thrives on the energy of a high-end kitchen. You don't just follow recipes; you understand the soul of fine dining:Education: You are a certified chef or have at least 2 years of solid professional experience in high-end gastronomy or luxury hotellerie.Skills: You have mastered fundamental cooking techniques (sautéing, poaching, braising) and possess excellent knife skills.Mindset: You implement the hotel’s standard recipes with confidence and have a sharp eye for detail and continuous improvement.Reliability: Punctuality, a professional appearance, and a clean, organized workspace are second nature to you.Languages: Italian is required, as well as a good command of English or German.Would you like to bring your passion into our kitchen at the Grand Hotel Kronenhof? We look forward to receiving your application! BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. ## Commis de Bar (m/w/d) Kulm Hotel 100% People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. This is youThe Foundation: Ideally, you have completed a degree or apprenticeship in hospitality or gastronomy.Initial Bar Experience: You know your way around a shaker, understand the basics of mixology, and have already gained some initial experience behind a bar.A Taste for Excellence: You have a basic understanding of spirits and—as a real bonus—you are interested in the sophisticated world of cigars.Language Talents: Our guests are international. You communicate confidently in German and English. If you also speak Italian, that’s the "olive in the martini."Passion: You live for excellent service, possess a sophisticated appearance, and maintain your elegance even when the house is full. descriptions.de: Koch - Mitarbeiter Restaurant (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 15.12.2025. ## Ihre Mission Ihre Bühne – unser Herz hinter den Kulissen: In unserem Hotel stehen nicht nur unsere Gäste im Mittelpunkt – auch unsere Mitarbeiter verdienen kulinarische Momente, die begeistern. Als Koch in unserem neu gegründeten Personalrestaurant sind Sie Gastgeber und kulinarischer Experte zugleich. Mit frischer, kreativer Küche und einem offenen Ohr für die Wünsche unseres Teams tragen Sie dazu bei, dass sich unsere Kollegen wie zu Hause fühlen. Ihre Aufgaben Vorbereitung abwechslungsreicher, ausgewogener Menüs für unser Team – mit Liebe zum Detail und Leidenschaft für Qualität Gastgeber im Mitarbeiterrestaurant sein: einladend, einnehmend und eine positive Atmosphäre schaffen Menüplanung und Umsetzung kulinarischer Themenwochen – Ihre Ideen sind willkommen Kombination aus Buffet-Service und Live-Cooking Sicherstellung eines reibungslosen Ablaufs in Ihrem Bereich – von mise en place bis zum makellosen Küchenabschluss Einhaltung der Hygienevorschriften nach HACCP – Sauberkeit ist für Sie selbstverständlich Enge Zusammenarbeit mit dem Küchenteam, dem Einkauf und der Personalabteilung – um ein großartiges Erlebnis für unsere Crew zu gewährleisten ## Das sind Sie Abgeschlossene Ausbildung zum zertifizierten Küchenchef oder gleichwertige Qualifikation Erfahrung sowohl in der warmen als auch in der kalten Küche, idealerweise in der Gemeinschaftsverpflegung oder der Hotellerie Leidenschaft für die Arbeit mit Menschen – Sie genießen es, Gastgeber zu sein, auch für Ihre Kollegen Stark Unsere dynamische und internationale Community bietet unseren Gästen smarten Luxus für ein unnachahmliches Urlaubserlebnis. Als Mitglied der Luxury Kulm Group sind Sie Teil des Schlüssels für unseren Erfolg. Gemeinsam machen wir jeden Aufenthalt zutiefst inspirierend, einzigartig und unverwechselbar. Und so begrüßen wir unsere Kultur: dezenten Luxus, Inspiration und eine Lebenserfahrung. Gemeinsam schaffen wir es. Dies ist Ihre Chance, ein Mitglied unserer prägenden Kultur zu sein: Das ist es, was Sie mit uns bewegen Als Commis de Bar unterstützen Sie unsere Barkeeper dabei, jeden Abend zu einer unvergesslichen Leistung zu machen:Atmosphäre mit Seele: Sie bereiten die Bar so vor, dass unsere Gäste das exklusive Flair spüren, sobald sie hereinkommen - wo jedes Detail zählt.Liquid Art: Sie helfen bei der Erstellung und dem eleganten Service von Getränken und Cocktails, die unsere hohen Kulm-Standards perfekt widerspiegeln.Die Kunst des Gastgebens: Sie sorgen dafür, dass "Wow-Moment" sowohl hinter als auch vor der Bar, damit sich unsere Gäste wie zu Hause fühlen.Storytelling in a Glass: Mit Charme und Know-how beraten Sie unsere Gäste und geben authentische Empfehlungen aus unserer exquisiten Getränkeauswahl.Behind the Scenes: Sie sorgen für einen reibungslosen Betrieb und achten sorgfältig auf die Einhaltung unserer hohen Hygiene- und Qualitätsstandards. This is youThe Foundation: Idealerweise haben Sie einen Abschluss oder eine Ausbildung in der Gastronomie oder Gastronomie absolviert.Erste Bar-Erfahrung: Sie kennen sich mit einem Shaker aus, verstehen die Grundlagen der Mixologie und haben bereits einige erste
descriptions.fr: Cuisinier - Restaurant du personnel (h/w/j) — Grand Hôtel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadine, Grisons). Pensum : 100%. Vertrag : Saisonstelle / Saisonnier. Stellenantritt : 2025-12-15. ## Votre mission Votre scène – notre cœur dans les coulisses : Dans notre hôtel, ce ne sont pas seulement nos clients qui occupent le devant de la scène – nos employés méritent également des moments culinaires qui inspirent. En tant que cuisinier dans notre nouveau restaurant du personnel, vous êtes à la fois hôte et expert culinaire. Avec une cuisine fraîche et créative et une écoute attentive des souhaits de notre équipe, vous contribuez à faire en sorte que nos collègues se sentent vraiment chez eux. Vos responsabilités Préparation de menus variés et équilibrés pour notre équipe – avec une attention aux détails et une passion pour la qualité Être un hôte dans le restaurant du personnel : accueillir, engager et créer une atmosphère positive Planification du menu et mise en œuvre de semaines à thème culinaire – vos idées sont les bienvenues Combinaison de service de buffet et de cuisine en direct Assurer le bon fonctionnement de votre section – de la mise en place à la fermeture de la cuisine sans tache Respect des règles d'hygiène selon HACCP – la propreté est une seconde nature pour vous Collaboration étroite avec l'équipe de cuisine, les achats et les RH – pour assurer une excellente expérience à notre équipe ## C'est vous Formation complète en tant que chef certifié ou qualification équivalente Expérience dans la cuisine chaude et froide, idéalement dans la restauration collective ou l'hôtellerie Une passion pour le travail avec les gens – vous aimez être un hôte, même pour vos collègues Forte Notre communauté dynamique et internationale offre à nos clients un luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inimitable. En tant que membre du groupe Luxury Kulm, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Et à ce titre, nous embrassons notre culture : un luxe discret, de l'inspiration et une expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous y parvenons. C'est votre chance d'être un membre de notre culture de façonnage : C'est ce que vous déplacez avec nousEn tant que Commis de Bar, vous soutenez nos barmans en faisant de chaque soirée une performance inoubliable :Atmosphère avec âme : Vous préparez le bar afin que nos clients se sentent le flair exclusif au moment où ils marchent dans-où chaque détail compte.Art liquide : Vous aidez à la création et au service élégant de boissons et de cocktails qui reflètent parfaitement nos normes exigeantes Kulm.L' art de l'hébergement : Vous vous assurez que « wow-moment » à la fois derrière et devant le bar, en veillant à ce que nos clients se sentent complètement à la maison.Récit dans un verre : Avec charme et expertise, vous conseillez nos clients et fournissez des recommandations authentiques de notre sélection de boissons exquises.Envers les scènes : Vous assurez le bon fonctionnement et accordez une attention méticuleuse au maintien de nos normes élevées d'hygiène et de qualité. C'est vousLa Fondation : Idéalement, vous avez obtenu un diplôme ou un apprentissage en hôtellerie ou en gastronomie.Expérience initiale au bar : Vous connaissez bien un shaker, vous comprenez les bases de la mixologie et vous avez déjà acquis quelques connaissances initiales

descriptions.it: Assistente di squadra Concierge e Guest Services (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / contratto di 10 mesi. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01. # Questo è ciò che si muove con noi Handling Guest Inquiry: Risponde alle richieste scritte e telefoniche in modo professionale e orientato al servizio, lavorando in stretto coordinamento con il Team Concierge. Supporto amministrativo: Si assiste al Concierge Team nelle operazioni quotidiane, gestendo in modo affidabile i compiti amministrativi e la pianificazione. Gestione dei dati e documentazione: Mantenete le informazioni degli ospiti e le panoramiche interne, assicurando la documentazione accurata e ben organizzata dei dati pertinenti. Ottimizzazione del processo: Identifichi le opportunità per ottimizzare i flussi di lavoro e implementare soluzioni di automazione minori utilizzando strumenti come Power Automate o Zapier. Coordinamento Backoffice: Tieni traccia di compiti, scadenze e comunicazione interna, garantendo un flusso regolare di informazioni all'interno del team. Garanzia di qualità: Aiuta a monitorare gli strumenti e i sistemi in uso e contribuire idee per migliorare l'offerta di assistenza clienti globale. # Questo sei uno stile di lavoro strutturato e autosufficiente con un forte senso di qualità, discrezione e affidabilità. Eccellente capacità di comunicazione verbale e scritta in tedesco e inglese – qualsiasi lingua aggiuntiva, soprattutto italiana, è un plus. Una passione per l'organizzazione, le competenze digitali forti e l'uso sicuro delle applicazioni di MS Office. Una mentalità orientata al servizio: si vede come un membro del team di supporto che lavora dietro le quinte – e si sa che le eccezionali esperienze degli ospiti sono costruite su un eccellente back office. ## Benefits At Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale, e numerosi vantaggi. ## Assistant Reservations Manager (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% persone a 1800m sul livello del mare stanno modellando il Luxury Mountain Travel. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti smart Luxury per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. Come membro del gruppo Luxury Kulm fai parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente ispiratore, unico e distintivo. E come tale, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso sobrio, ispirazione e un'esperienza di vita. Insieme, facciamo in modo che accada. Questa è la tua possibilità di essere un membro della nostra cultura di modellazione: Questo è ciò che ti muovi con noiVoi siete la voce del nostro hotel: Sia per telefono o per e-mail, si realizzano offerte interessanti, confermano le prenotazioni e assicurano che i follow-up siano gestiti con precisione – il tutto in linea con gli standard LHW e ISO. Pensi in termini di occupazione e opportunità: Si mantiene il nostro piano di prenotazioni accurato e aggiornato, contribuendo attivamente all'utilizzo ottimale del nostro inventario camera. Porti i numeri in vita: In stretta collaborazione con Executive Assistant Manager e Front Office Manager, si sviluppano previsioni e report essenziali per la pianificazione quotidiana. Sei meticoloso con i dati: I profili e i database degli ospiti sono mantenuti con cura e discrezione – struttura e conformità fanno parte del vostro DNA. Stai davanti alla curva: Dalla gestione del sistema Channel Manager per raffinare continuamente i nostri standard ISO e RIMS, garantisci operazioni fluide e porta nuove idee alla tavola. Si trasforma il potenziale in prestazioni: Upselling è più di un compito per voi – è un modo per migliorare il viaggio degli ospiti e creare valore aggiunto significativo. Perché unirsi a noi? Perché farai parte di uno degli hotel più rinomati della Svizzera – un luogo dove non lavori, ti aiuti a plasmare il futuro. Sarete circondati da professionisti appassionati e sperimentare una cultura di squadra definita da eleganza, autenticità e collaborazione. Questo è lo sfondo professionale: Hai completato la formazione professionale in ospitalità o in un campo commerciale – idealmente all'interno dell'ospitalità di lusso – e offrono diversi anni di esperienza rilevante. Set di vendite: Capisci cosa guida le decisioni di prenotazione e come elevare l'esperienza degli ospiti attraverso le vendite strategiche delle camere. Capacità linguistiche: Si parla e si scrive fluentemente in tedesco e inglese; conoscenza aggiuntiva del francese o italiano è un plus. Composure & chiarezza: Sia sotto pressione o in comunicazione diretta degli ospiti, rimani professionale, efficiente e caldo. Guida e orientamento alla crescita: Siete impazienti non solo di soddisfare le aspettative, ma di migliorare i processi e investire nel vostro sviluppo. BenefitsAt Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale, e numerosi vantaggi. ## Nachtportier/ Night Auditor (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% persone a 1800m sul livello del mare stanno modellando il Luxury Mountain Travel. Questa è la tua possibilità di essere un membro della nostra cultura di modellazione: Questo è ciò che ti trasferisci con noiFront Office & Guest: Gestione dei check-in tardivi e check-out anticipati, fornendo assistenza agli ospiti professionale tramite telefono, e soddisfare le richieste speciali degli ospiti. Servizio di Valet & Bagagli: Parcheggio veicoli per gli ospiti in garage e assistenza con servizio bagagli e in camera. Notte Audit: Completare la chiusura giornaliera del sistema (Opera Cloud), i report dei punti di controllo e la gestione del cash management fisico per il reparto contabilità. Sicurezza e controllo: Conducendo regolari giri di sicurezza, monitorando il pannello di allarme antincendio, e assicurando la pace notturna e la tranquillità durante tutta la sede. Preparazione: Generando rapporti di reparto, l'acquisto e la pubblicazione di giornali, e fornendo servizi di lucentezza scarpa per i nostri ospiti. Questa è la vostra esperienza: Un solido background nel settore alberghiero (preferibilmente nel segmento a 5 stelle) e un'esperienza idealmente precedente nei turni notturni. IT Proficienza: gestione sicura dei sistemi PMS (Opera Cloud) e delle applicazioni standard di MS Office. Lingue: fluente in tedesco e inglese; la conoscenza dell'italiano è un vantaggio significativo grazie alla nostra posizione e clientela. Personalità: Un alto senso di responsabilità, assoluta discrezione e un aspetto lucido che soddisfa i nostri standard di lusso. BenefitsAt Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti smart Luxury per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. Come membro del gruppo Luxury Kulm fai parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente ispiratore, unico e distintivo. E come tale, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso sobrio, ispirazione e un'esperienza di vita. Insieme, facciamo in modo che accada. Questa è la tua possibilità di essere un membro della nostra cultura di modellazione: Questo è ciò che ti muovi con noiOfferta benvenuto per i nostri ospiti: Con la vostra naturale cordialità e carisma, fate sentire tutti gli ospiti a casa fin dal primo momento. Parcheggio: Parcheggi i nostri ospiti' veicoli nel garage sotterraneo e gestisci la logistica del garage, sempre con attenzione ai dettagli e all'ordine. Trasferimenti degli ospiti: Sia che si tratti dell'impianto di risalita o del ristorante, gestisci i trasferimenti degli ospiti con la navetta dell'hotel, garantendo un viaggio sicuro e piacevole. Servizi per gli ospiti: carico/scarico dei bagagli degli ospiti e gestione di piccole commissioni secondo le necessità. Questa è l'Amico Naturale e la Charisma: Si può quasi anticipare le esigenze dei nostri ospiti discernenti e fare ogni sforzo per garantire il loro soggiorno è il più piacevole possibile. Aspetto Groomed e Manner eccellenti: Tu rappresenti il nostro hotel con stile, impressionando con cortesia professionale e un elegante demeanor. Spirito di squadra e flessibilità: Ti piace lavorare in una squadra dinamica, adattandosi rapidamente a varie esigenze, sempre con un sorriso. Valido Driver's Licenza: Naturalmente, si dispone di una valida patente di guida's e sentire confortevole manovra in spazi di parcheggio stretti e sulla strada. Personality: You have a sophisticated appearance, a true host’s heart, and find joy in personal guest interaction. Languages: Must-have: Native or bilingual fluency in German and excellent English. Additional languages are a distinct advantage. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Because you’ll be part of one of Switzerland’s most renowned hotels – a place where you don’t just work, you help shape the future. You’ll be surrounded by passionate professionals and experience a team culture defined by elegance, authenticity, and collaboration. Administrative Unterstützung: Sie unterstützen das Concierge Team im täglichen Betrieb, indem Sie administrative Aufgaben und Planung zuverlässig verwalten. Datenmanagement & Dokumentation: Sie pflegen Gastinformationen und interne Übersichten, um eine genaue und gut organisierte Dokumentation relevanter Daten zu gewährleisten. Prozessoptimierung: Sie identifizieren Möglichkeiten, Workflows zu optimieren und kleinere Automatisierungslösungen mithilfe von Tools wie Power Automate oder Zapier zu implementieren. Backoffice Koordination: Sie verfolgen Aufgaben, Termine und interne Kommunikation, um einen reibungslosen Informationsfluss innerhalb des Teams sicherzustellen. Qualitätssicherung: Sie helfen dabei, die Werkzeuge und Systeme im Einsatz zu überwachen und Ideen zur Verbesserung des gesamten Gastangebots beizutragen. Hier handelt es sich um einen strukturierten, selbstständigen Arbeitsstil mit einem starken Gefühl von Qualität, Diskretion und Zuverlässigkeit. Ausgezeichnete verbale und schriftliche Kommunikationsfähigkeiten in Deutsch und Englisch – jede zusätzliche Sprache, vor allem Italienisch, ist ein Plus. Eine Leidenschaft für Organisation, starke digitale Fähigkeiten und zuversichtliche Nutzung von MS Office-Anwendungen. Ein Service-getriebenes Mindset: Sie sehen sich als unterstützendes Teammitglied, das hinter den Kulissen arbeitet – und Sie wissen, dass hervorragende Gasterlebnisse auf einem hervorragenden Backoffice aufgebaut sind. Unsere Mitarbeiter sind das Herz unseres Erfolgs. Wir bieten attraktive Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten, komfortable Unterkünfte, erschwingliche Mahlzeiten im Personalrestaurant und zahlreiche Getränke.
