C'est votre chance d'être membre de notre culture : Voici ce que vous déplacez avec nousAccueil chaleureux de nos hôtes : Grâce à votre amabilité naturelle et à votre charisme, vous faites en sorte que chaque invité se sente comme chez lui dès le premier instant.Valet de parking : Vous garez les véhicules de nos hôtes dans le garage souterrain et gérez la logistique du garage, toujours avec le souci du détail et de l'ordre.Transferts des hôtes : Qu'il s'agisse des remontées mécaniques ou du restaurant, vous assurez le transfert des clients avec la navette de l'hôtel, en veillant à ce que le trajet soit sûr et agréable.Services aux clients : chargement/déchargement des bagages des clients et petites courses selon les besoins. C'est vousL'amabilité et le charisme naturels : vous pouvez presque anticiper les besoins de nos clients exigeants et faire tout votre possible pour que leur séjour soit le plus agréable possible.Une apparence soignée et d'excellentes manières : Vous représentez notre hôtel avec style, impressionnant par votre politesse professionnelle et votre élégance.Esprit d'équipe et flexibilité : Vous aimez travailler au sein d'une équipe dynamique et vous vous adaptez rapidement aux différentes demandes, toujours avec le sourire.Permis de conduire valide : Bien entendu, vous êtes titulaire d'un permis de conduire valide et vous vous sentez à l'aise pour manœuvrer dans des espaces de stationnement restreints et sur la route.Compétences linguistiques : Idéalement, vous parlez allemand et anglais, d'autres langues (en particulier l'italien) étant un avantage appréciable. AvantagesAu sein du Groupe Kulm, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des possibilités de développement intéressantes, des logements confortables, des repas abordables au restaurant du personnel et de nombreux avantages. ## Front Office Agent (m/w/d) Kulm Hotel 100% Les personnes qui vivent à 1800 mètres d'altitude façonnent les voyages de luxe en montagne. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale offre à nos clients un luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inimitable. En tant que membre du groupe de luxe Kulm, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Et en tant que tel, nous embrassons notre culture : un luxe discret, de l'inspiration et une expérience de vie. C'est ensemble que nous y parvenons. C'est votre chance d'être membre de notre culture : En tant qu'agent de réception, vous êtes souvent le premier et le dernier point de contact de nos clients internationaux. Dans ce rôle, vous combinez une chaleur authentique avec la précision d'une hospitalité 5 étoiles, transformant chaque séjour en une expérience inoubliable.Vos responsabilités:La première impression : Enregistrement et départ chaleureux, mise en chambre professionnelle et assistance compétente aux clients tout au long de leur séjour.Excellence du service : Contribution active au bon déroulement des opérations quotidiennes du front office, conformément aux normes élevées de "The Leading Hotels of the World" (LHW).Coordination : Gestion et traitement des réservations via Protel, ainsi que gestion fiable de la trésorerie.Communication : Communication : traitement des demandes des clients et gestion des plaintes avec tact et diplomatie. C'est vousFondation : Formation professionnelle complète dans le domaine de l'hôtellerie et (première) expérience professionnelle au front office d'un hôtel de luxe ou haut de gamme.Langues : Maîtrise de l'allemand et de l'anglais. Des langues supplémentaires sont un atout bienvenu.Compétences informatiques : Maîtrise de l'utilisation d'Opera Cloud et de MS Office.Personnalité : Vous vous distinguez par une apparence soignée, une nature résistante et une véritable passion pour l'art du service.Pourquoi le Kulm ? Nous vous offrons un lieu de travail dans l'un des endroits les plus exclusifs au monde. Une équipe motivée, des avantages intéressants au sein du groupe Kulm et la possibilité d'acquérir une expérience précieuse dans un environnement riche en traditions vous attendent.Prêt pour l'esprit Kulm ? Nous nous réjouissons de recevoir votre candidature ! AvantagesAu sein du groupe Kulm, nos collaborateurs sont au cœur de notre réussite. Nous offrons des possibilités de développement intéressantes, des logements confortables, des repas abordables au restaurant du personnel et de nombreux avantages.

descriptions.it:
Luxury Spa Supervisor (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-09.

## This is what you move with us
Providing high-quality facials, manicures and pedicures (including gel colour polish with OPI) at Swiss deluxe level.
Performing classic and signature massages – ideally including Lomi Lomi, Thai or hot stone.
Helping to create an unforgettable spa experience: providing personal advice to our guests, actively selling exclusive products and treatments.
Supporting the spa manager in administrative tasks, team coordination and daily operations
Assisting with quality assurance and monitoring order and hygiene throughout the spa, pool and fitness areas
Representing our spa concept with a warm welcome and a sense of style – always with a smile

## This is you
Completed training as a beautician and masseuse and at least 2 years of professional experience in a high-end spa environment.
Very good knowledge of manicures/pedicures, massages and beauty treatments – including confident working with high-quality products and techniques.
Host mentality with a sense of aesthetics, discretion and excellent understanding of service.
Fluent German and very good English skills – any additional languages are a plus.
Organisational skills, sales talent and enjoyment of working in a luxury hotel at a 5-star superior level.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Pool Attendant/ Life Guard (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usCreating Perfect Pool Moments: You ensure smooth operations in the pool and sauna areas, keeping a keen eye on every detail.A Heartfelt Host: You welcome our guests with a smile and provide attentive service throughout the entire SPA and pool area.Hygiene at the Highest Level: You guarantee cleanliness and order across the SPA and perform daily quality controls.Crafting Moments of Well-being: With your additional qualifications in sauna infusions (Aufgüsse), aqua gym, and swimming lessons for our younger guests, you actively contribute to the relaxation experience and the joy of being in the water.
This is youProfessional Qualification: Completed vocational training as a Lifeguard, Specialist for Pool Operations (Fachangestellte/r für Bäderbetriebe), or an equivalent qualification.Relevant Experience: Proven experience in pool operations and water supervision, as well as in conducting sauna infusions and swimming lessons.Certifications: Ideally, you hold the Brevet Plus Pool (SLRG) and have sound knowledge of First Aid and BLS-AED.Language Skills: Excellent German and English skills; additional languages are an advantage.Personality: An attentive, warm personality with a strong sense of safety, service, and hospitality.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%

This is youCompleted training as a massage therapist or a comparable qualification in the spa and wellness field.Additional certifications (e.g., Thai massage, Shiatsu, Lomi Lomi, reflexology, lymphatic drainage) are an advantage.Ideally, experience in fitness classes such as yoga or Pilates.Proven experience in the spa sector, preferably in luxury hospitality.Excellent communication skills in German and English and a sensitivity to the wishes of our guests.Flexibility to work weekends, holidays, and special events like our Night Spa.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

Since our textiles are cleaned at the professional laundry facility of our partner hotel, the Kulm, we are looking for an organized individual to ensure a smooth workflow and on-site quality assurance in Pontresina.What you achieve with us:Logistics Management: You coordinate the daily flow of linen (soiled/clean) between the Kronenhof and the Kulm laundry.Quality Control: You inspect incoming laundry for cleanliness and completeness, ensuring our high standards are consistently met.Inventory Management: You organize the storage of floor linen, uniforms, and guest laundry, ensuring all departments are supplied on time.Communication: You serve as the direct point of contact for the laundry team at the Kulm Hotel and handle operational details with confidence.Minor Repairs: When necessary, you take care of simple sewing tasks or repairs to uniforms and textiles. This is youOrganizational Talent: You maintain an overview even with large volumes of laundry and work in a structured and efficient manner.Quality Consciousness: You have an eye for textiles and immediately recognize when something does not meet our 5-star requirements.Reliability: Punctuality and the physical stamina required for handling laundry trolleys are a matter of course for you.Team Player: You communicate in a friendly and clear manner – both internally with Housekeeping and externally with colleagues at the Kulm.Language Skills: Good knowledge of English and either German or Italian is essential for coordination and documentation. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

descriptions.it: Supervisore Spa di Lusso (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadina, Grigioni). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / contratto di 10 mesi. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-09. ## Questo è quello che ti muovi con noi Fornire trattamenti facciali di alta qualità, manicure e pedicure (compreso smalto color gel con OPI) a livello svizzero deluxe. Esecuzione di massaggi classici e firma – idealmente tra cui Lomi Lomi, thailandese o pietra calda. Aiutare a creare un'esperienza termale indimenticabile: fornire consigli personali ai nostri ospiti, vendendo attivamente prodotti e trattamenti esclusivi. Sostenere il responsabile della spa in compiti amministrativi, coordinamento del team e operazioni quotidiane Assistere con l'assicurazione della qualità e l'ordine di monitoraggio e igiene in tutte le aree spa, piscina e fitness Rappresentare il nostro concetto di spa con un caloroso benvenuto e un senso di stile – sempre con un sorriso ## This is you Completato la formazione come estetista e massaggiatrice e almeno 2 anni di esperienza professionale in un ambiente spa di fascia alta. Ottima conoscenza di manicure/pedicure, massaggi e trattamenti di bellezza – tra cui un lavoro sicuro con prodotti e tecniche di alta qualità. mentalità ospitante con un senso di estetica, discrezione e eccellente comprensione del servizio. Tedesco fluido e molto buone abilità inglese – qualsiasi lingua aggiuntiva sono un plus. Competenze organizzative, talento di vendita e il piacere di lavorare in un hotel di lusso a 5 stelle di livello superiore. ## Vantaggi A Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. • Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale, e numerosi vantaggi. Applicare ora ## Pool Attendant/ Life Guard (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Le persone a 1800m sul livello del mare stanno modellando il Luxury Mountain Travel. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti smart Luxury per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. Come membro del gruppo Luxury Kulm fai parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente ispiratore, unico e distintivo. E come tale, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso sobrio, ispirazione e un'esperienza di vita. Insieme, facciamo in modo che accada. Questa è la tua possibilità di essere un membro della nostra cultura di modellazione: Questo è quello che ti muovi con noiCreating Perfect Pool Moments: Garantisci operazioni fluide nelle aree piscina e sauna, tenendo d'occhio ogni dettaglio. A Heartfelt Host: accoglie i nostri ospiti con un sorriso e fornisce un servizio attento in tutta la zona SPA e piscina. Igiene al livello più alto: garantisce pulizia e ordine attraverso la SPA e eseguire controlli di qualità giornalieri. Crafting Moments of Well-being: Con le tue qualifiche aggiuntive in infusioni di sauna (Aufgüsse), palestra aqua e lezioni di nuoto per i nostri ospiti più piccoli, contribuisci attivamente all'esperienza di relax e alla gioia di essere in acqua. Si tratta di una qualificazione professionale professionale completata come Lifeguard, Specialist for Pool Operations (Fachangestellte/r für Bäderbetriebe), o di una qualifica equivalente. Esperienza rilevante: esperienza comprovata nelle operazioni di piscina e supervisione dell'acqua, oltre a condurre infusioni di sauna e lezioni di nuoto. Certificazioni: Idealmente, si tiene la piscina Brevet Plus (SLRG) e hanno una solida conoscenza di First Aid e BLS-AED. Competenze linguistiche: ottime competenze in tedesco e inglese; lingue aggiuntive sono un vantaggio. Questa è la tua possibilità di essere un membro della nostra cultura di modellazione: Questo è ciò che si muove con noiAl Grand Hotel Kronenhof, apprezziamo la qualità più alta – e questo si estende alla nostra biancheria. Dal momento che i nostri tessuti sono puliti presso la lavanderia professionale del nostro hotel partner, il Kulm, stiamo cercando un individuo organizzato per garantire un flusso di lavoro liscio e la garanzia di qualità in loco a Pontresina. Che cosa si ottiene con noi: Gestione della Logistica: Si coordina il flusso quotidiano di lino (sottigliato/pulito) tra il Kronenhof e la lavanderia Kulm. Controllo qualità: ispeziona la lavanderia in entrata per la pulizia e la completezza, assicurando i nostri elevati standard sono costantemente soddisfatti. Gestione dell'inventario: Si organizza il deposito di biancheria da terra, uniformi e lavanderia degli ospiti, assicurando tutti i dipartimenti sono forniti in tempo. Comunicazione: Siete il punto di contatto diretto per la squadra di lavanderia del Kulm Hotel e gestite con fiducia i dettagli operativi. Riparazioni minori: Quando necessario, si prende cura di semplici compiti di cucito o riparazioni a uniformi e tessuti. Questo è il talento organizzativo: si mantiene una panoramica anche con grandi volumi di lavanderia e lavoro in modo strutturato ed efficiente. Coscienza di qualità: Avete un occhio per i tessuti e riconoscere immediatamente quando qualcosa non soddisfa i nostri requisiti a 5 stelle. Affidabilità: puntualità e la resistenza fisica necessaria per la movimentazione di carrelli lavanderia sono una questione naturalmente per voi. Team Player: Si comunica in modo amichevole e chiaro – sia internamente con la pulizia e esternamente con colleghi al Kulm. Competenze linguistiche: La buona conoscenza dell'inglese e del tedesco o dell'italiano è essenziale per il coordinamento e la documentazione. BenefitsAt Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale, e numerosi vantaggi.

Da unsere Textilien in der professionellen Wäscherei unseres Partnerhotels Kulm gereinigt werden, suchen wir eine organisierte Person, die einen reibungslosen Arbeitsablauf und eine Vor-Ort-Qualitätssicherung in Pontresina gewährleistet. Kleinere Reparaturen: Wenn nötig, übernehmen Sie einfache Näharbeiten oder Reparaturen an Uniformen und Textilien. Das bist duOrganisatorisches Talent: Du behältst auch bei großen Wäschemengen einen Überblick und arbeitest strukturiert und effizient. Qualitätsbewusstsein: Sie haben ein Auge für Textilien und erkennen sofort, wenn etwas nicht unseren 5-Sterne-Anforderungen entspricht. Zuverlässigkeit: Pünktlichkeit und die körperliche Ausdauer, die für den Umgang mit Wäschewagen erforderlich sind, sind für Sie selbstverständlich. Teamplayer: Sie kommunizieren freundlich und klar – sowohl intern mit dem Housekeeping als auch extern mit Kollegen am Kulm. Sprachkenntnisse: Gute Englisch- und Deutsch- oder Italienischkenntnisse sind für die Koordination und Dokumentation unerlässlich. Gestion des stocks : Vous organisez le stockage du linge de sol, des uniformes et de la lessive des clients, en veillant à ce que tous les services soient livrés à temps. Communication : Vous servez de point de contact direct pour l’équipe de blanchisserie de l’hôtel Kulm et gérez les détails opérationnels en toute confiance. Réparations mineures : Lorsque nécessaire, vous vous occupez de tâches de couture simples ou de réparations d’uniformes et de textiles. Voici vousTalent organisationnel : Vous maintenez une vue d’ensemble même avec de grands volumes de lessive et travaillez de manière structurée et efficace. Sensibilisation à la qualité : Vous avez un œil pour les textiles et reconnaissez immédiatement quand quelque chose ne répond pas à nos exigences 5 étoiles. Fiabilité : La ponctualité et l’endurance physique requises pour manipuler les chariots à linge sont une question courante pour vous. Joueur d’équipe : Vous communiquez de manière amicale et claire – aussi bien en interne avec le service de ménage qu’en externe avec les collègues du Kulm. Compétences linguistiques : Une bonne connaissance de l’anglais et de l’allemand ou de l’italien est essentielle pour la coordination et la documentation. descriptions.it: Reservations Agent (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01. ## This is what you move with us Competently handle reservations for individual and group guests as the first point of contact, ensuring the highest level of professionalism and proactive attention to detail Maintain and update guest databases with the utmost accuracy, contributing significantly to guest satisfaction and loyalty Address and resolve guest complaints promptly and with sensitivity, always finding the most suitable solution in a discreet and efficient manner Manage multichannel communication, responding to all incoming enquiries by phone and email Coordinate with other departments to ensure optimal alignment between room and event occupancy and our F&B and Spa offerings Support the Reservations Manager with administrative tasks, ensure adherence to our high standards, and contribute to the continuous improvement of our products ## This is you Charisma and friendliness with a natural warmth and refined manners, combined with a keen sense for the needs of discerning guests Team spirit and flexibility, with excellent communication skills and the ability to adapt in a dynamic work environment Experience in luxury hospitality, with completed vocational training and at least two years of experience in a 5-star hotel in Front Office or Reservations Strong language skills in German and English (written and spoken); additional languages such as Italian are an advantage Technical proficiency in Opera Cloud, Microsoft Word, Excel, and Outlook, as well as experience managing online booking channels Exceptional organisational skills and customer focus, ensuring precise planning, discreet guest relations, and outstanding service delivery ## Benefits At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. • We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. Apply now ## Assistant Front Office Manager (m/w/d) Kulm Hotel 100% People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: This is what you move with usLeadership & Partnership: You confidently represent the Front Office Manager and work together to ensure seamless operations at the highest level.The Guest Journey: From a warm welcome to a smooth check-out, you ensure our guests' stay is truly unforgettable.Knowledge Sharing: You contribute your expertise through staff training and performance reviews, while maintaining clear and professional communication with all other departments.Point of Contact: You serve as the primary contact for our guests—competent, proactive, and solution-oriented at all times.Administrative Excellence: You are responsible for statistics and month-end closings, ensuring strict adherence to LHW, Forbes, and Kulm standards.Guest Experience: With your profound knowledge of the hotel and the local region, you inspire our guests and guarantee a unique, world-class experience. This is youEducation & Experience: You hold a degree in hospitality or business, with at least 3 years of experience in the 5-star luxury hotel segment.Leadership Skills: You possess proven leadership experience and a genuine passion for delivering exceptional service.Personality: You have a sophisticated appearance, a true host’s heart, and find joy in personal guest interaction.Languages: Must-have: Native or bilingual fluency in German and excellent English. Additional languages are a distinct advantage.Start Date: Available from June; we offer both 10-month seasonal or permanent year-round positions. BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. • We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. ## Assistant Reservations Manager (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: This is what you move with usYou are the voice of our hotel: Whether by phone or email, you craft compelling offers, confirm bookings, and ensure follow-ups are handled with precision – all in line with LHW and ISO standards.You think in terms of occupancy and opportunity: You keep our reservations plan accurate and up to date, actively contributing to the optimal utilization of our room inventory.You bring numbers to life: In close collaboration with the Executive Assistant Manager and Front Office Manager, you develop forecasts and reports that are essential for daily planning.You are meticulous with data: Guest profiles and databases are maintained with care and discretion – structure and compliance are part of your DNA.You stay ahead of the curve: From managing the Channel Manager system to continuously refining our ISO and RIMS standards – you ensure smooth operations and bring fresh ideas to the table.You turn potential into performance: Upselling is more than a task to you – it’s a way to enhance the guest journey and create meaningful added value.Why join us? Because you’ll be part of one of Switzerland’s most renowned hotels – a place where you don’t just work, you help shape the future. You’ll be surrounded by passionate professionals and experience a team culture defined by elegance, authenticity, and collaboration. This is youProfessional background: You have completed vocational training in hospitality or a commercial field – ideally within luxury hospitality – and offer several years of relevant experience. Sales mindset: You understand what drives booking decisions and how to elevate the guest experience through strategic room sales. Language skills: You speak and write fluently in German and English; additional knowledge of French or Italian is a plus. Composure & clarity: Whether under pressure or in direct guest communication, you remain professional, efficient, and warm. Drive & growth orientation: You are eager not just to meet expectations but to improve processes and invest in your own development. BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. • We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. ## Driver (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: This is what you move with usWarm welcome for our guests: With your natural friendliness and charisma, you make every guest feel at home from the very first moment.Valet parking: You park our guests' vehicles in the underground garage and manage garage logistics, always with attention to detail and order.Guest transfers: Whether it’s from the ski lift or to the restaurant, you handle guest transfers with the hotel shuttle, ensuring a safe and pleasant ride.Guest services: loading/ unloading the guests luggage and handling small errands as needed. This is youNatural Friendliness and Charisma: You can almost anticipate the needs of our discerning guests and make every effort to ensure their stay is as pleasant as possible.Groomed Appearance and Excellent Manners: You represent our hotel with style, impressing with professional politeness and an elegant demeanor.Team Spirit and Flexibility: You enjoy working in a dynamic team, quickly adapting to various demands, always with a smile.Valid Driver's License: Of course, you have a valid driver's license and feel comfortable maneuvering in tight parking spaces and on the road.Language Skills: Ideally, you speak German and English, with additional languages (particularly Italian) being a welcome advantage. BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. • We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.
